\u4f53\u79ef\u5206\u5e03\u4ea4\u6362 \u2014 \u6bcf\u4e2a\u7269\u8d28\u70b9\u72ec\u7acb\u4e0e\u6d74\u4ea4\u6362 (\u8d8b\u8fd1 0D)\n  D. \u8584\u58f3\u8fd1\u4f3c \u2014 \u539a\u58c1\u7403\u58f3\u51e0\u4f55\n  E. \u975e\u5747\u5300\u50ac\u5316 \u2014 \u50ac\u5316\u5242\u4ec5\u5728\u7403\u5fc3\u9644\u8fd1\n  F. \u7ec4\u5408\u7b56\u7565\n\"\"\"\n\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil, time\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use(\"Agg\")\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\n\n# ============================================================\n# Core model (compact, from sphere_1d_fullmech.py)\n# ============================================================\n\n@dataclass\nclass P:\n    N: int = 31\n    t_end: float = 600.0\n    n_save: int = 4000\n    method: str = \"BDF\"\n    rtol: float = 1e-5\n    atol: float = 1e-7\n    max_step: float = 0.5\n\n    phi_p0: float = 0.15\n    chi_inf: float = 0.40\n    S_chi: float = 0.50\n    chi1: float = 0.80\n    Omega_e: float = 0.10\n    ell: float = 0.005\n\n    Da: float = 2.5\n    delta: float = 0.10\n    alpha: float = 0.30\n    Gamma_A: float = 1.0\n    eps_T: float = 0.03\n    arrh_cap: float = 50.0\n    m_act: float = 4.0\n    m_diff: float = 2.0\n    m_mob: float = 1.0\n\n    Bi_mu: float = 1.0\n    Bi_c: float = 1.0\n    Bi_T: float = 0.80\n    \n    # \u4f53\u79ef\u5206\u5e03\u4ea4\u6362 (\u5173\u952e\u65b0\u53c2\u6570)\n    Bi_J_vol: float = 0.0    # \u4f53\u79ef\u6eb6\u5242\u4ea4\u6362: logJ_t -= Bi_J_vol*(m-m_b)/J\n    Bi_c_vol: float = 0.0    # \u4f53\u79ef\u5e95\u7269\u4f9b\u7ed9: W_t += Bi_c_vol*(J-W)\n    B_Tvol: float = 0.0      # \u4f53\u79ef\u6563\u70ed: \u03b8_t -= B_Tvol*\u03b8\n    \n    # \u8584\u58f3: R \u2208 [R_inner, 1], R_inner=0 \u2192 \u5b9e\u5fc3\u7403\n    R_inner: float = 0.0\n\n    m_b: float = 0.0\n    auto_m_b: bool = True\n\n    M0: float = 1.0; D0: float = 1.0; C0: float = 1.0; K0: float = 1.0\n\n    elastic_model: str = 'isotropic'  # 'isotropic' or 'full'\n    \n    J_init: float = 1.50\n    J_start: float = 0.35\n    u_init: float = 0.50\n    theta_init: float = 1.70\n    eps_pert: float = 0.02\n    J_min_factor: float = 1.02\n    J_max: float = 8.0\n    u_floor: float = 1e-12\n    theta_clip: float = 25.0\n\n_LJM = np.log(8.0)\n\nclass Grid:\n    def __init__(self, N, R_inner=0.0):\n        self.N = N\n        R0 = max(R_inner, 0.0)\n        self.R_f = np.linspace(R0, 1, N+1)\n        self.dR = self.R_f[1] - self.R_f[0]\n        self.R_c = 0.5*(self.R_f[:-1]+self.R_f[1:])\n        self.R2_f = self.R_f**2\n        self.V = (self.R_f[1:]**3 - self.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.0\n        self.V_safe = np.maximum(self.V, 1e-30)\n        self.R_inner = R0\n    def sph_div(self, flux):\n        return (self.R2_f[1:]*flux[1:] - self.R2_f[:-1]*flux[:-1])/self.V_safe\n\ndef phi_f(J, p):\n    return np.clip(p.phi_p0/np.maximum(J, p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor), 0, 0.999)\n\ndef hmean(a, b):\n    return 2*a*b/np.maximum(a+b, 1e-30)\n\ndef m_mix(J, th, p):\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\n    chi = p.chi_inf + p.S_chi*th + p.chi1*phi\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-15)) + phi + chi*phi**2\n\ndef m_el_iso(J, p):\n    return p.Omega_e*(J**(-1./3.) - 1./J)\n\ndef reconstruct(J, grid):\n    N = grid.N\n    r3f = np.zeros(N+1)\n    # \u5982\u679c\u662f\u7a7a\u5fc3\u7403, r\u00b3(R_inner) = R_inner\u00b3\n    r3f[0] = grid.R_inner**3\n    for i in range(N):\n        r3f[i+1] = r3f[i] + 3*J[i]*grid.V[i]\n    rf = np.cbrt(np.maximum(r3f, 1e-30))\n    rc = 0.5*(rf[:-1]+rf[1:])\n    lt = np.empty(N)\n    if grid.R_inner > 0.01:\n        lt[:] = rc/grid.R_c\n    else:\n        lt[0] = J[0]**(1./3.)\n        lt[1:] = rc[1:]/grid.R_c[1:]\n    lr = J/np.maximum(lt**2, 1e-12)\n    return rc, lr, lt\n\ndef stress_eq(J, lr, lt, rc, grid):\n    N = grid.N; dR = grid.dR\n    Sr = np.zeros(N)\n    for i in range(N-2, -1, -1):\n        r1 = max(rc[i+1], 1e-12)\n        f1 = (2*lr[i+1]/r1)*(lr[i+1]**2 - lt[i+1]**2)/J[i+1]\n        r0 = max(rc[i], 1e-12)\n        f0 = (2*lr[i]/r0)*(lr[i]**2 - lt[i]**2)/J[i]\n        Sr[i] = Sr[i+1] + 0.5*(f1+f0)*dR\n    return Sr\n\ndef m_el_full(J, lr, lt, Sr, p):\n    I1 = lr**2 + 2*lt**2\n    return p.Omega_e*(I1/(3*J) - 1./J) + p.Omega_e*Sr\n\ndef thermal(th, p):\n    d = 1 + p.eps_T*np.maximum(th, -0.95/p.eps_T)\n    return np.exp(np.clip(p.Gamma_A*th/d, -p.arrh_cap, p.arrh_cap))\n\ndef rxn(u, th, J, p):\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\n    return np.maximum(u, p.u_floor)*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_act*thermal(th, p)\n\ndef finalize(p):\n    if p.auto_m_b:\n        J0 = np.array([p.J_init])\n        p = replace(p, m_b=float((m_mix(J0, np.array([0.0]), p) + m_el_iso(J0, p))[0]))\n    return p\n\ndef rhs(t, y, p, grid):\n    N = p.N; dR = grid.dR\n    ljmin = np.log(p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor)\n    lJ = np.clip(y[:N], ljmin, _LJM)\n    W = y[N:2*N]\n    th = np.clip(y[2*N:], -10, p.theta_clip)\n    J = np.exp(lJ); u = np.maximum(W/J, p.u_floor)\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\n\n    mm = m_mix(J, th, p)\n    if p.elastic_model == 'full':\n        rc, lr, lt = reconstruct(J, grid)\n        Sr = stress_eq(J, lr, lt, rc, grid)\n        me = m_el_full(J, lr, lt, Sr, p)\n    else:\n        me = m_el_iso(J, p)\n    \n    m_local = mm + me\n    # Laplacian\n    gJ = np.zeros(N+1)\n    gJ[1:N] = (J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\n    if grid.R_inner > 0.01:\n        gJ[0] = 0  # inner wall: zero flux or zero gradient\n    m = m_local - p.ell**2 * grid.sph_div(gJ)\n\n    # Solvent flux\n    q = np.zeros(N+1)\n    Mc = p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_mob\n    Mf = hmean(Mc[:-1], Mc[1:])\n    q[1:N] = -Mf*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR\n    # inner BC: q[0]=0 for solid sphere, also 0 for shell (impermeable inner wall)\n    q[N] = p.Bi_mu*(m[-1]-p.m_b)\n\n    lJt = -grid.sph_div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*(m_local - p.m_b)/J\n\n    R_rate = rxn(u, th, J, p)\n\n    nf = np.zeros(N+1)\n    Dc = p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_diff\n    Df = hmean(Dc[:-1], Dc[1:])\n    qi = q[1:N]\n    uu = np.where(qi>=0, u[:-1], u[1:])\n    nf[1:N] = qi*uu - p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\n    nf[N] = p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.0)\n    Wt = -grid.sph_div(nf) - p.Da*J*R_rate + p.Bi_c_vol*(J-W)\n\n    h = np.zeros(N+1)\n    h[1:N] = -p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\n    h[N] = p.Bi_T*th[-1]\n    tht = (-grid.sph_div(h) + p.Da*J*R_rate)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*th\n\n    return np.concatenate([lJt, Wt, tht])\n\ndef mk_sp(N):\n    sz=3*N; S=lil_matrix((sz,sz),dtype=np.float64)\n    bw={(0,0):2,(0,2):1,(1,0):2,(1,1):1,(1,2):1,(2,2):1}\n    for(kr,kc),w in bw.items():\n        for i in range(N):\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\n                j=i+dj\n                if 0<=j<N: S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.0\n    return csc_matrix(S)\n\ndef simulate(p, mode='from_0d'):\n    p = finalize(p)\n    grid = Grid(p.N, p.R_inner)\n    R = grid.R_c\n    ljmin = np.log(p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor)\n    if mode == 'from_0d':\n        J0 = p.J_start + p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*(R-grid.R_inner)/(1-grid.R_inner))\n        u0 = p.u_init + 0.05*(1-R)\n        th0 = p.theta_init + 0.05*(1-R**2)\n    elif mode == 'collapsed_core':\n        sm = 0.5*(1+np.tanh((R-0.5)/0.08))\n        J0 = 0.25+(1.5-0.25)*sm; u0 = 0.1+0.6*sm; th0 = 1.5*(1-sm)+0.1*sm\n    else:\n        J0 = p.J_start*np.ones(p.N) + p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R)\n        u0 = p.u_init*np.ones(p.N); th0 = p.theta_init*np.ones(p.N)\n    J0 = np.maximum(J0, np.exp(ljmin)+1e-6)\n    u0 = np.maximum(u0, p.u_floor)\n    y0 = np.concatenate([np.log(J0), J0*u0, th0])\n\n    rhs_fn = lambda t,y: rhs(t,y,p,grid)\n    t0 = time.perf_counter()\n    sol = solve_ivp(rhs_fn,(0,p.t_end),y0, jac_sparsity=mk_sp(p.N),\n                    method=p.method, t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),\n                    rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\n    elapsed = time.perf_counter()-t0\n    if not sol.success: raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\n    N=p.N\n    Js = np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],ljmin,_LJM))\n    Ws = sol.y[N:2*N]; ths = sol.y[2*N:]\n    us = np.maximum(Ws/Js, p.u_floor)\n    return {\"t\":sol.t,\"J\":Js,\"u\":us,\"theta\":ths,\"grid\":grid,\"elapsed\":elapsed,\"nfev\":sol.nfev}\n\ndef vol_avg(f, g):\n    w = g.V/np.sum(g.V)\n    return np.sum(f*w[:,None], axis=0)\n\ndef osc_det(t, y, frac=0.5, floor=1e-3):\n    i0=int(len(t)*frac); tt,yy=t[i0:],y[i0:]\n    if len(tt)<30: return {\"osc\":False,\"amp\":0,\"T\":np.nan}\n    yd=yy-np.polyval(np.polyfit(tt,yy,1),tt)\n    amp=float(np.max(yd)-np.min(yd))\n    pks,_=find_peaks(yd,prominence=max(0.15*amp,floor),distance=max(3,len(yd)//20))\n    T=float(np.mean(np.diff(tt[pks]))) if len(pks)>=2 else np.nan\n    return {\"osc\":amp>floor and len(pks)>=2,\"amp\":amp,\"T\":T,\"np\":len(pks)}\n\ndef run_case(label, overrides, base, outdir):\n    params = {**base, **overrides}\n    pp = finalize(P(**params))\n    mode = 'collapsed_core' if overrides.get('_mode')=='cs' else 'from_0d'\n    if '_mode' in overrides: del overrides['_mode']\n    try:\n        d = simulate(pp, mode=mode)\n        g = d[\"grid\"]\n        thm = vol_avg(d[\"theta\"], g)\n        Jm = vol_avg(d[\"J\"], g)\n        o = osc_det(d[\"t\"], thm)\n        Jf=np.mean(d[\"J\"][:,-1]); thf=np.mean(d[\"theta\"][:,-1])\n        Jstd=np.std(d[\"J\"][:,-1])\n        s = \"OSC\" if o[\"osc\"] else \"stab\"\n        print(f\"  {label:25s}: {s} J={Jf:.3f}\u00b1{Jstd:.3f} \u03b8={thf:.3f} \"\n              f\"amp={o['amp']:.4f} T={o.get('T',0):.1f} [{d['elapsed']:.1f}s]\")\n        if o[\"osc\"]:\n            # Save plots\n            fig,axes=plt.subplots(3,1,figsize=(12,9),sharex=True)\n            axes[0].plot(d[\"t\"],Jm,'b',lw=0.8); axes[0].set_ylabel(\"<J>\"); axes[0].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\n            axes[0].set_title(f\"{label}: amp={o['amp']:.3f}, T={o['T']:.1f}\")\n            axes[1].plot(d[\"t\"],vol_avg(d[\"u\"],g),'orange',lw=0.8); axes[1].set_ylabel(\"<u>\"); axes[1].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\n            axes[2].plot(d[\"t\"],thm,'r',lw=0.8); axes[2].set_ylabel(\"<\u03b8>\"); axes[2].set_xlabel(\"t\"); axes[2].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\n            fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/{label}.png\",dpi=130); plt.close(fig)\n            \n            # Kymograph\n            fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(15,4))\n            for ax,fld,nm,cm in [(axes[0],d[\"J\"],\"J\",\"viridis\"),(axes[1],d[\"theta\"],\"\u03b8\",\"hot\"),(axes[2],d[\"u\"],\"u\",\"YlOrRd\")]:\n                im=ax.pcolormesh(d[\"t\"],g.R_c,fld,shading=\"auto\",cmap=cm)\n                ax.set_xlabel(\"t\"); ax.set_ylabel(\"R\"); ax.set_title(nm); fig.colorbar(im,ax=ax)\n            fig.suptitle(label,fontweight=\"bold\"); fig.tight_layout()\n            fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/{label}_kymo.png\",dpi=130); plt.close(fig)\n        return o\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"  {label:25s}: FAIL {str(e)[:50]}\")\n        return {\"osc\":False,\"amp\":0}\n\n# ============================================================\n# Main exploration\n# ============================================================\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    outdir = \"/home/claude/explore_osc\"\n    os.makedirs(outdir, exist_ok=True)\n\n    base = dict(\n        N=31, t_end=600, n_save=4000,\n        chi_inf=0.40, S_chi=0.50, Da=2.5,\n        Bi_T=0.80, Bi_mu=1.0, Bi_c=1.0,\n        Gamma_A=1.0, m_act=4.0,\n        alpha=0.30, delta=0.10,\n        Omega_e=0.10, phi_p0=0.15, chi1=0.80,\n        ell=0.005, J_init=1.5, J_start=0.35,\n        u_init=0.50, theta_init=1.70,\n        elastic_model='isotropic',\n    )\n\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    print(\"Strategy A: \u4f53\u79ef\u5206\u5e03\u4ea4\u6362 (\u8d8b\u8fd1 0D)\")\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    for Bv in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0]:\n        run_case(f\"A_BiJvol={Bv}\", {\"Bi_J_vol\":Bv, \"Bi_c_vol\":Bv, \"B_Tvol\":0}, base, outdir)\n\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*70)\n    print(\"Strategy B: \u4f53\u79ef\u5206\u5e03\u4ea4\u6362 + \u4f53\u79ef\u6563\u70ed\")\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    for Bv, Btv in [(1.0, 0.1), (1.0, 0.3), (1.0, 0.5), (2.0, 0.3), (0.5, 0.2)]:\n        run_case(f\"B_Bv={Bv}_Bt={Btv}\", {\"Bi_J_vol\":Bv, \"Bi_c_vol\":Bv, \"B_Tvol\":Btv}, base, outdir)\n\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*70)\n    print(\"Strategy C: \u9ad8 Omega_e (\u6d88\u9664\u81a8\u80c0\u5206\u652f)\")\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    for Oe in [0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0]:\n        run_case(f\"C_Oe={Oe}\", {\"Omega_e\":Oe}, base, outdir)\n    for Oe in [0.5, 0.8]:\n        run_case(f\"C_Oe={Oe}_Da4\", {\"Omega_e\":Oe, \"Da\":4.0}, base, outdir)\n\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*70)\n    print(\"Strategy D: \u8868\u9762\u963b\u6ede + \u4f53\u79ef\u4ea4\u6362\")\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    for Bmu_s, Bv in [(0.01, 1.0), (0.01, 0.5), (0.05, 1.0), (0.1, 0.5)]:\n        run_case(f\"D_Bmu={Bmu_s}_Bv={Bv}\",\n                 {\"Bi_mu\":Bmu_s, \"Bi_J_vol\":Bv, \"Bi_c_vol\":Bv}, base, outdir)\n\n    print(\"\\n\" + \"=\"*70)\n    print(\"Strategy E: \u7a7a\u5fc3\u7403\u58f3\")\n    print(\"=\"*70)\n    for Ri in [0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9]:\n 1D \\u4e2d\\u6eb6\\u5242\\u4ece\\u8868\\u9762\\u6d8c\\u5165\\u5f62\\u6210\\u81a8\\u80c0\\u524d\\u6cbf,\\n  \\u628a\\u7cfb\\u7edf\\u62d6\\u5411\\u5168\\u5c40\\u7a33\\u5b9a\\u81a8\\u80c0\\u6001. \\u6d88\\u9664\\u81a8\\u80c0\\u5206\\u652f \\u2014 \\u63d0\\u9ad8 Omega_e \\u4f7f\\u5f39\\u6027\\u60e9\\u7f5a\\u963b\\u6b62\\u8fc7\\u5ea6\\u81a8\\u80c0\\n  B. \\u8868\\u9762\\u963b\\u6ede \\u2014 \\u964d\\u4f4e Bi_mu \\u4f7f\\u6eb6\\u5242\\u8fdb\\u5165\\u6781\\u6162\\n  C. \\u4f53\\u79ef\\u5206\\u5e03\\u4ea4\\u6362 \\u2014 \\u975e\\u5747\\u5300\\u50ac\\u5316 \\u2014 \\u50ac\\u5316\\u5242\\u4ec5\\u5728\\u7403\\u5fc3\\u9644\\u8fd1\\n  F. \\u7ec4\\u5408\\u7b56\\u7565\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil, time\\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use(\\\"Agg\\\")\\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\\n\\n# ============================================================\\n# Core model (compact, from sphere_1d_fullmech.py)\\n# ============================================================\\n\\n@dataclass\\nclass P:\\n    N: int = 31\\n    t_end: float = 600.0\\n    n_save: int = 4000\\n    method: str = \\\"BDF\\\"\\n    rtol: float = 1e-5\\n    atol: float = 1e-7\\n    max_step: float = 0.5\\n\\n    phi_p0: float = 0.15\\n    chi_inf: float = 0.40\\n    S_chi: float = 0.50\\n    chi1: float = 0.80\\n    Omega_e: float = 0.10\\n    ell: float = 0.005\\n\\n    Da: float = 2.5\\n    delta: float = 0.10\\n    alpha: float = 0.30\\n    Gamma_A: float = 1.0\\n    eps_T: float = 0.03\\n    arrh_cap: float = 50.0\\n    m_act: float = 4.0\\n    m_diff: float = 2.0\\n    m_mob: float = 1.0\\n\\n    Bi_mu: float = 1.0\\n    Bi_c: float = 1.0\\n    Bi_T: float = 0.80\\n    \\n    # \\u4f53\\u79ef\\u5206\\u5e03\\u4ea4\\u6362 (\\u5173\\u952e\\u65b0\\u53c2\\u6570)\\n    Bi_J_vol: float = 0.0    # \\u4f53\\u79ef\\u6eb6\\u5242\\u4ea4\\u6362: logJ_t -= Bi_J_vol*(m-m_b)/J\\n    Bi_c_vol: float = 0.0    # \\u4f53\\u79ef\\u5e95\\u7269\\u4f9b\\u7ed9: W_t += Bi_c_vol*(J-W)\\n    B_Tvol: float = 0.0      # \\u4f53\\u79ef\\u6563\\u70ed: \\u03b8_t -= B_Tvol*\\u03b8\\n    \\n    # \\u8584\\u58f3: R \\u2208 [R_inner, 1], R_inner=0 \\u2192 \\u5b9e\\u5fc3\\u7403\\n    R_inner: float = 0.0\\n\\n    m_b: float = 0.0\\n    auto_m_b: bool = True\\n\\n    M0: float = 1.0; D0: float = 1.0; C0: float = 1.0; K0: float = 1.0\\n\\n    elastic_model: str = 'isotropic'  # 'isotropic' or 'full'\\n    \\n    J_init: float = 1.50\\n    J_start: float = 0.35\\n    u_init: float = 0.50\\n    theta_init: float = 1.70\\n    eps_pert: float = 0.02\\n    J_min_factor: float = 1.02\\n    J_max: float = 8.0\\n    u_floor: float = 1e-12\\n    theta_clip: float = 25.0\\n\\n_LJM = np.log(8.0)\\n\\nclass Grid:\\n    def __init__(self, N, R_inner=0.0):\\n        self.N = N\\n        R0 = max(R_inner, 0.0)\\n        self.R_f = np.linspace(R0, 1, N+1)\\n        self.dR = self.R_f[1] - self.R_f[0]\\n        self.R_c = 0.5*(self.R_f[:-1]+self.R_f[1:])\\n        self.R2_f = self.R_f**2\\n        self.V = (self.R_f[1:]**3 - self.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.0\\n        self.V_safe = np.maximum(self.V, 1e-30)\\n        self.R_inner = R0\\n    def sph_div(self, flux):\\n        return (self.R2_f[1:]*flux[1:] - self.R2_f[:-1]*flux[:-1])/self.V_safe\\n\\ndef phi_f(J, p):\\n    return np.clip(p.phi_p0/np.maximum(J, p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor), 0, 0.999)\\n\\ndef hmean(a, b):\\n    return 2*a*b/np.maximum(a+b, 1e-30)\\n\\ndef m_mix(J, th, p):\\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\\n    chi = p.chi_inf + p.S_chi*th + p.chi1*phi\\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-15)) + phi + chi*phi**2\\n\\ndef m_el_iso(J, p):\\n    return p.Omega_e*(J**(-1./3.) - 1./J)\\n\\ndef reconstruct(J, grid):\\n    N = grid.N\\n    r3f = np.zeros(N+1)\\n    # \\u5982\\u679c\\u662f\\u7a7a\\u5fc3\\u7403, r\\u00b3(R_inner) = R_inner\\u00b3\\n    r3f[0] = grid.R_inner**3\\n    for i in range(N):\\n        r3f[i+1] = r3f[i] + 3*J[i]*grid.V[i]\\n    rf = np.cbrt(np.maximum(r3f, 1e-30))\\n    rc = 0.5*(rf[:-1]+rf[1:])\\n    lt = np.empty(N)\\n    if grid.R_inner > 0.01:\\n        lt[:] = rc/grid.R_c\\n    else:\\n        lt[0] = J[0]**(1./3.)\\n        lt[1:] = rc[1:]/grid.R_c[1:]\\n    lr = J/np.maximum(lt**2, 1e-12)\\n    return rc, lr, lt\\n\\ndef stress_eq(J, lr, lt, rc, grid):\\n    N = grid.N; dR = grid.dR\\n    Sr = np.zeros(N)\\n    for i in range(N-2, -1, -1):\\n        r1 = max(rc[i+1], 1e-12)\\n        f1 = (2*lr[i+1]/r1)*(lr[i+1]**2 - lt[i+1]**2)/J[i+1]\\n        r0 = max(rc[i], 1e-12)\\n        f0 = (2*lr[i]/r0)*(lr[i]**2 - lt[i]**2)/J[i]\\n        Sr[i] = Sr[i+1] + 0.5*(f1+f0)*dR\\n    return Sr\\n\\ndef m_el_full(J, lr, lt, Sr, p):\\n    I1 = lr**2 + 2*lt**2\\n    return p.Omega_e*(I1/(3*J) - 1./J) + p.Omega_e*Sr\\n\\ndef thermal(th, p):\\n    d = 1 + p.eps_T*np.maximum(th, -0.95/p.eps_T)\\n    return np.exp(np.clip(p.Gamma_A*th/d, -p.arrh_cap, p.arrh_cap))\\n\\ndef rxn(u, th, J, p):\\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\\n    return np.maximum(u, p.u_floor)*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_act*thermal(th, p)\\n\\ndef finalize(p):\\n    if p.auto_m_b:\\n        J0 = np.array([p.J_init])\\n        p = replace(p, m_b=float((m_mix(J0, np.array([0.0]), p) + m_el_iso(J0, p))[0]))\\n    return p\\n\\ndef rhs(t, y, p, grid):\\n    N = p.N; dR = grid.dR\\n    ljmin = np.log(p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor)\\n    lJ = np.clip(y[:N], ljmin, _LJM)\\n    W = y[N:2*N]\\n    th = np.clip(y[2*N:], -10, p.theta_clip)\\n    J = np.exp(lJ); u = np.maximum(W/J, p.u_floor)\\n    phi = phi_f(J, p)\\n\\n    mm = m_mix(J, th, p)\\n    if p.elastic_model == 'full':\\n        rc, lr, lt = reconstruct(J, grid)\\n        Sr = stress_eq(J, lr, lt, rc, grid)\\n        me = m_el_full(J, lr, lt, Sr, p)\\n    else:\\n        me = m_el_iso(J, p)\\n    \\n    m_local = mm + me\\n    # Laplacian\\n    gJ = np.zeros(N+1)\\n    gJ[1:N] = (J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\\n    if grid.R_inner > 0.01:\\n        gJ[0] = 0  # inner wall: zero flux or zero gradient\\n    m = m_local - p.ell**2 * grid.sph_div(gJ)\\n\\n    # Solvent flux\\n    q = np.zeros(N+1)\\n    Mc = p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_mob\\n    Mf = hmean(Mc[:-1], Mc[1:])\\n    q[1:N] = -Mf*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR\\n    # inner BC: q[0]=0 for solid sphere, also 0 for shell (impermeable inner wall)\\n    q[N] = p.Bi_mu*(m[-1]-p.m_b)\\n\\n    lJt = -grid.sph_div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*(m_local - p.m_b)/J\\n\\n    R_rate = rxn(u, th, J, p)\\n\\n    nf = np.zeros(N+1)\\n    Dc = p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi, 1e-12)**p.m_diff\\n    Df = hmean(Dc[:-1], Dc[1:])\\n    qi = q[1:N]\\n    uu = np.where(qi>=0, u[:-1], u[1:])\\n    nf[1:N] = qi*uu - p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\\n    nf[N] = p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.0)\\n    Wt = -grid.sph_div(nf) - p.Da*J*R_rate + p.Bi_c_vol*(J-W)\\n\\n    h = np.zeros(N+1)\\n    h[1:N] = -p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\\n    h[N] = p.Bi_T*th[-1]\\n    tht = (-grid.sph_div(h) + p.Da*J*R_rate)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*th\\n\\n    return np.concatenate([lJt, Wt, tht])\\n\\ndef mk_sp(N):\\n    sz=3*N; S=lil_matrix((sz,sz),dtype=np.float64)\\n    bw={(0,0):2,(0,2):1,(1,0):2,(1,1):1,(1,2):1,(2,2):1}\\n    for(kr,kc),w in bw.items():\\n        for i in range(N):\\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\\n                j=i+dj\\n                if 0<=j<N: S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.0\\n    return csc_matrix(S)\\n\\ndef simulate(p, mode='from_0d'):\\n    p = finalize(p)\\n    grid = Grid(p.N, p.R_inner)\\n    R = grid.R_c\\n    ljmin = np.log(p.phi_p0*p.J_min_factor)\\n    if mode == 'from_0d':\\n        J0 = p.J_start + p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*(R-grid.R_inner)/(1-grid.R_inner))\\n        u0 = p.u_init + 0.05*(1-R)\\n        th0 = p.theta_init + 0.05*(1-R**2)\\n    elif mode == 'collapsed_core':\\n        sm = 0.5*(1+np.tanh((R-0.5)/0.08))\\n        J0 = 0.25+(1.5-0.25)*sm; u0 = 0.1+0.6*sm; th0 = 1.5*(1-sm)+0.1*sm\\n    else:\\n        J0 = p.J_start*np.ones(p.N) + p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R)\\n        u0 = p.u_init*np.ones(p.N); th0 = p.theta_init*np.ones(p.N)\\n    J0 = np.maximum(J0, np.exp(ljmin)+1e-6)\\n    u0 = np.maximum(u0, p.u_floor)\\n    y0 = np.concatenate([np.log(J0), J0*u0, th0])\\n\\n    rhs_fn = lambda t,y: rhs(t,y,p,grid)\\n    t0 = time.perf_counter()\\n    sol = solve_ivp(rhs_fn,(0,p.t_end),y0, jac_sparsity=mk_sp(p.N),\\n                    method=p.method, t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),\\n                    rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\\n    elapsed = time.perf_counter()-t0\\n    if not sol.success: raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\\n    N=p.N\\n    Js = np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],ljmin,_LJM))\\n    Ws = sol.y[N:2*N]; ths = sol.y[2*N:]\\n    us = np.maximum(Ws/Js, p.u_floor)\\n    return {\\\"t\\\":sol.t,\\\"J\\\":Js,\\\"u\\\":us,\\\"theta\\\":ths,\\\"grid\\\":grid,\\\"elapsed\\\":elapsed,\\\"nfev\\\":sol.nfev}\\n\\ndef vol_avg(f, g):\\n    w = g.V/np.sum(g.V)\\n    return np.sum(f*w[:,None], axis=0)\\n\\ndef osc_det(t, y, frac=0.5, floor=1e-3):\\n    i0=int(len(t)*frac); tt,yy=t[i0:],y[i0:]\\n    if len(tt)<30: return {\\\"osc\\\":False,\\\"amp\\\":0,\\\"T\\\":np.nan}\\n    yd=yy-np.polyval(np.polyfit(tt,yy,1),tt)\\n    amp=float(np.max(yd)-np.min(yd))\\n    pks,_=find_peaks(yd,prominence=max(0.15*amp,floor),distance=max(3,len(yd)//20))\\n    T=float(np.mean(np.diff(tt[pks]))) if len(pks)>=2 else np.nan\\n    return {\\\"osc\\\":amp>floor and len(pks)>=2,\\\"amp\\\":amp,\\\"T\\\":T,\\\"np\\\":len(pks)}\\n\\ndef run_case(label, overrides, base, outdir):\\n    params = {**base, **overrides}\\n    pp = finalize(P(**params))\\n    mode = 'collapsed_core' if overrides.get('_mode')=='cs' else 'from_0d'\\n    if '_mode' in overrides: del overrides['_mode']\\n    try:\\n        d = simulate(pp, mode=mode)\\n        g = d[\\\"grid\\\"]\\n        thm = vol_avg(d[\\\"theta\\\"], g)\\n        Jm = vol_avg(d[\\\"J\\\"], g)\\n        o = osc_det(d[\\\"t\\\"], thm)\\n        Jf=np.mean(d[\\\"J\\\"][:,-1]); thf=np.mean(d[\\\"theta\\\"][:,-1])\\n        Jstd=np.std(d[\\\"J\\\"][:,-1])\\n        s = \\\"OSC\\\" if o[\\\"osc\\\"] else \\\"stab\\\"\\n        print(f\\\"  {label:25s}: {s} J={Jf:.3f}\\u00b1{Jstd:.3f} \\u03b8={thf:.3f} \\\"\\n              f\\\"amp={o['amp']:.4f} T={o.get('T',0):.1f} [{d['elapsed']:.1f}s]\\\")\\n        if o[\\\"osc\\\"]:\\n            # Save plots\\n            fig,axes=plt.subplots(3,1,figsize=(12,9),sharex=True)\\n            axes[0].plot(d[\\\"t\\\"],Jm,'b',lw=0.8); axes[0].set_ylabel(\\\"<J>\\\"); axes[0].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\\n            axes[0].set_title(f\\\"{label}: amp={o['amp']:.3f}, T={o['T']:.1f}\\\")\\n            axes[1].plot(d[\\\"t\\\"],vol_avg(d[\\\"u\\\"],g),'orange',lw=0.8); axes[1].set_ylabel(\\\"<u>\\\"); axes[1].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\\n            axes[2].plot(d[\\\"t\\\"],thm,'r',lw=0.8); axes[2].set_ylabel(\\\"<\\u03b8>\\\"); axes[2].set_xlabel(\\\"t\\\"); axes[2].grid(True,alpha=0.3)\\n            fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(f\\\"{outdir}/{label}.png\\\",dpi=130); plt.close(fig)\\n            \\n            # Kymograph\\n            fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(15,4))\\n            for ax,fld,nm,cm in [(axes[0],d[\\\"J\\\"],\\\"J\\\",\\\"viridis\\\"),(axes[1],d[\\\"theta\\\"],\\\"\\u03b8\\\",\\\"hot\\\"),(axes[2],d[\\\"u\\\"],\\\"u\\\",\\\"YlOrRd\\\")]:\\n                im=ax.pcolormesh(d[\\\"t\\\"],g.R_c,fld,shading=\\\"auto\\\",cmap=cm)\\n                ax.set_xlabel(\\\"t\\\"); ax.set_ylabel(\\\"R\\\"); ax.set_title(nm); fig.colorbar(im,ax=ax)\\n            fig.suptitle(label,fontweight=\\\"bold\\\"); fig.tight_layout()\\n            fig.savefig(f\\\"{outdir}/{label}_kymo.png\\\",dpi=130); plt.close(fig)\\n        return o\\n    except Exception as e:\\n The slab can sustain uniform oscillations because boundary effects are confined to the surface layer, but the sphere's spherical geometry creates a much stronger coupling between surface and interior through the 1/R\u00b2 divergence factor. This means the surface effects penetrate deeply inward, and the diffusive coupling homogenizes the system too effectively for oscillations to persist. The sphere's surface-to-volume ratio is also fundamentally different from the slab's\u20143/R versus 1/H\u2014which changes the effective Biot numbers and stability of the uniform steady state. what if I make the sphere parameters equivalent to the slab's effective parameters? The ratio gives an effective Bi_T_sphere = Bi_T_slab * (H\u2080/R\u2080) * 3.     "thinking": "Nothing is oscillating. Let me think about this more carefully.\n\nThe fundamental issue is that in 1D, the system always finds a stable steady state. Let me re-examine the 0D model. But when we go to 1D, the system doesn't stay near that SS because spatial coupling makes it more stable.\n\nWait - I need to check whether the 1D system's UNIFORM steady state is actually Hopf-unstable. In 1D with uniform initial conditions, if the uniform state is Hopf-unstable, the system should oscillate uniformly (the k=0 mode). \n\nThe spatial modes might damp out, but uniform oscillations should survive if that steady state is truly unstable. Let me check if the 1D code actually reproduces the 0D behavior when I start with spatially uniform conditions. But in 1D with finite volume discretization, the surface flux at the boundary only affects the outermost cell, not the entire domain. The effective exchange rate at the surface scales as Bi_mu divided by the outer cell's volume, which becomes very large for small grid spacing, while interior cells experience a much weaker coupling.\n\nThis means the 1D uniform steady state is fundamentally different from 0D\u2014the interior can sit at a different chemical potential than the surface, with only the boundary cell in equilibrium with the bath. Adding the volumetric Bi_J_vol term should couple the entire domain to the bath, but even then, the stability properties of the resulting uniform steady state differ from the 0D case, which is why oscillations don't emerge as expected. The 1D formulation with volume terms drops the J^{2/3} scaling factors that appear in the 0D model, fundamentally changing the stability characteristics. However, even if the uniform steady state becomes unstable, spatial diffusion of solvent and heat could suppress those instabilities through negative contributions to the eigenvalues\u2014though this damping only affects non-uniform modes, leaving the k=0 uniform mode unaffected.\n\nSo I need to examine whether this modified 0D system (the k=0 mode equations without the J^{2/3} factors) actually exhibits a Hopf bifurcation, which would cause uniform oscillations.",

    "name": "bash_tool",
    "input": {
      "command": "cd /home/claude && timeout 60 python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import fsolve\n\n# 1D-equivalent 0D model with VOLUME exchange (no J^{2/3})\n# dJ/dt = -Bi_J_vol * (m - m_b)   [note: /J cancels with J*logJ_t]\n# J du/dt = -u dJ/dt + Bi_c_vol*J*(1-u) - Da*J*R\n# C d\u03b8/dt = Da*R*J - C*B_Tvol*\u03b8   [note: R already multiplied by J in heat src]\n\ndef phi_of_J(J, phi_p0=0.15):\n    return phi_p0 / max(J, phi_p0*1.02)\n\ndef chem_pot(J, theta, chi_inf=0.40, S_chi=0.5, chi1=0.80, Omega_e=0.10, phi_p0=0.15):\n    phi = phi_of_J(J, phi_p0)\n    chi = chi_inf + S_chi*theta + chi1*phi\n    m_mix = np.log(max(1-phi, 1e-15)) + phi + chi*phi**2\n    m_el = Omega_e * (J**(-1./3.) - 1./J)\n    return m_mix + m_el\n\ndef rxn_rate(u, theta, J, Gamma_A=1.0, m_act=4.0, phi_p0=0.15, eps_T=0.03):\n    phi = phi_of_J(J, phi_p0)\n    act = max(1-phi, 1e-12)**m_act\n    denom = 1 + eps_T*max(theta, -0.95/eps_T)\n    thermal = np.exp(min(Gamma_A*theta/denom, 50))\n    return max(u, 1e-12) * act * thermal\n\ndef rhs_vol(y, Da, Bi_J_vol, Bi_c_vol, B_Tvol, m_b, C0=1.0, **kw):\n    J, u, theta = y\n    J = max(J, 0.16)\n    u = max(u, 1e-12)\n    \n    m = chem_pot(J, theta, **{k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in ['chi_inf','S_chi','chi1','Omega_e','phi_p0']})\n    R = rxn_rate(u, theta, J, **{k:v for k,v in kw.items() if k in ['Gamma_A','m_act','phi_p0','eps_T']})\n    \n    dJdt = -Bi_J_vol * (m - m_b)\n    dJudt = Bi_c_vol * J * (1 - u) - Da * J * R\n    dudt = (dJudt - u*dJdt) / J\n    dthetadt = (Da * R - B_Tvol * theta) / C0  # Note: no J in heat source for vol exchange\n    \n    return np.array([dJdt, dudt, dthetadt])\n\ndef jacobian(y, **kw):\n    n = len(y)\n    J = np.zeros((n,n))\n    f0 = rhs_vol(y, **kw)\n    for i in range(n):\n        yp = y.copy()\n        h = max(1e-7, 1e-5*abs(y[i]))\n        yp[i] += h\n        J[:,i] = (rhs_vol(yp, **kw) - f0) / h\n    return J\n\n# Scan: find Hopf bifurcation in the volume-exchange 0D model\nprint(\"Volume-exchange 0D model: Hopf scan\")\nprint(\"=\"*60)\n\nkw_base = dict(chi_inf=0.40, S_chi=0.50, chi1=0.80, Omega_e=0.10, phi_p0=0.15,\n               Gamma_A=1.0, m_act=4.0, eps_T=0.03, C0=1.0)\n\nm_b = chem_pot(1.5, 0.0, **{k:v for k,v in kw_base.items() if k in ['chi_inf','S_chi','chi1','Omega_e','phi_p0']})\nprint(f\"m_b = {m_b:.4f}\")\n\n# Scan Da with fixed Bi_J_vol, Bi_c_vol, B_Tvol\nfor Bvj, Bvc, Bvt in [(1.0, 1.0, 0.8), (2.0, 2.0, 1.5), (3.0, 3.0, 2.0), (0.5, 0.5, 0.5)]:\n    print(f\"\\n  Bi_J_vol={Bvj}, Bi_c_vol={Bvc}, B_Tvol={Bvt}:\")\n    for Da in np.arange(1, 15, 0.5):\n        params = dict(Da=Da, Bi_J_vol=Bvj, Bi_c_vol=Bvc, B_Tvol=Bvt, m_b=m_b, **kw_base)\n        # Find SS\n        def F(y): return rhs_vol(y, **params)\n        ss = None\n        for g in [(0.35, 0.5, 1.7), (0.5, 0.3, 1.0), (1.0, 0.5, 0.5), (1.5, 0.3, 0.3)]:\n            try:\n                sol = fsolve(F, list(g), full_output=True)\n                x = sol[0]\n                if sol[2] == 1 and x[0] > 0.16 and x[1] > 0:\n                    if ss is None or x[0] < ss[0]:  # prefer collapsed branch\n                        ss = x\n            except: pass\n        if ss is None: continue\n        \n        J = jacobian(ss, **params)\n        eigvals = np.linalg.eigvals(J)\n        mr = max(np.real(eigvals))\n        has_imag = any(abs(np.imag(eigvals)) > 1e-6)\n        \n        if has_imag and abs(mr) < 0.2:\n            phi_ss = 0.15/ss[0]\n            print(f\"    Da={Da:5.1f}: J={ss[0]:.3f} u={ss[1]:.3f} \u03b8={ss[2]:.3f} \"\n                  f\"\u03c6={phi_ss:.3f} max_re={mr:+.4f} {'HOPF' if mr>0 else 'near'}\")\nPYEOF\n",
      "description": "Find Hopf bifurcation in the volume-exchange 0D model"
    },

f0) / h\\n    return J\\n\\n# Scan: find Hopf bifurcation in the volume-exchange 0D model\\nprint(\\\"Volume-exchange 0D model: Hopf scan\\\")\\nprint(\\\"=\\\"*60)\\n\\nkw_base = dict(chi_inf=0.40, S_chi=0.50, chi1=0.80, Omega_e=0.10, phi_p0=0.15,\\n               Gamma_A=1.0, m_act=4.0, eps_T=0.03, C0=1.0)\\n\\nm_b = chem_pot(1.5, 0.0, **{k:v for k,v in kw_base.items() if k in ['chi_inf','S_chi','chi1','Omega_e','phi_p0']})\\nprint(f\\\"m_b = {m_b:.4f}\\\")\\n\\n# Scan Da with fixed Bi_J_vol, Bi_c_vol, B_Tvol\\nfor Bvj, Bvc, Bvt in [(1.0, 1.0, 0.8), (2.0, 2.0, 1.5), (3.0, 3.0, 2.0), (0.5, 0.5, 0.5)]:\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n  Bi_J_vol={Bvj}, Bi_c_vol={Bvc}, B_Tvol={Bvt}:\\\")\\n    for Da in np.arange(1, 15, 0.5):\\n        params = dict(Da=Da, Bi_J_vol=Bvj, Bi_c_vol=Bvc, B_Tvol=Bvt, m_b=m_b, **kw_base)\\n        # Find SS\\n        def F(y): return rhs_vol(y, **params)\\n        ss = None\\n        for g in [(0.35, 0.5, 1.7), (0.5, 0.3, 1.0), (1.0, 0.5, 0.5), (1.5, 0.3, 0.3)]:\\n            try:\\n                sol = fsolve(F, list(g), full_output=True)\\n                x = sol[0]\\n                if sol[2] == 1 and x[0] > 0.16 and x[1] > 0:\\n                    if ss is None or x[0] < ss[0]:  # prefer collapsed branch\\n                        ss = x\\n            except: pass\\n        if ss is None: continue\\n        \\n        J = jacobian(ss, **params)\\n        eigvals = np.linalg.eigvals(J)\\n        mr = max(np.real(eigvals))\\n        has_imag = any(abs(np.imag(eigvals)) > 1e-6)\\n        \\n        if has_imag and abs(mr) < 0.2:\\n            phi_ss = 0.15/ss[0]\\n            print(f\\\"    Da={Da:5.1f}: J={ss[0]:.3f} u={ss[1]:.3f} \\u03b8={ss[2]:.3f} \\\"\\n                  f\\\"\\u03c6={phi_ss:.3f} max_re={mr:+.4f} {'HOPF' if mr>0 else 'near'}\\\")\\nPYEOF\\n\"}"

    "type": "thinking",
    "thinking": "No Hopf bifurcation found in the volume-exchange model. That means the volume-exchange 0D equations don't have a Hopf bifurcation at all! The J^{2/3} factor in the original 0D model is crucial for the oscillation.\n\nThe J^{2/3} factor comes from the surface area: dJ/dt = Bi_mu * J^{2/3} * (m_b - m). This factor creates a nonlinear coupling that's essential for the Hopf bifurcation. Without it (volume exchange), the system is always stable.\n\nThis is the fundamental reason why volume-distributed exchange doesn't produce oscillation in 1D: the underlying 0D equations are different.\n \nSo the real issue is that volume exchange fundamentally lacks the geometric nonlinearity needed for oscillations. I could try artificially combining volume exchange with the J^{2/3} factor to see if that recovers the Hopf bifurcation, which would tell me whether the surface area scaling is the critical ingredient.",

  {
    "start_timestamp": "2026-04-07T03:15:05.388401Z",
    "stop_timestamp": "2026-04-07T03:15:27.548836Z",
    "flags": null,
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_018trn3M1DLnkKQpMWnUJx14",
    "name": "bash_tool",
    "input": {
      "command": "cd /home/claude && timeout 60 python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import fsolve\n\ndef phi_of_J(J): return 0.15 / max(J, 0.16)\n\ndef chem_pot(J, theta):\n    phi = phi_of_J(J)\n    chi = 0.40 + 0.50*theta + 0.80*phi\n    return np.log(max(1-phi,1e-15)) + phi + chi*phi**2 + 0.10*(J**(-1./3.) - 1./J)\n\ndef rxn(u, theta, J):\n    phi = phi_of_J(J)\n    d = 1+0.03*max(theta,-30.)\n    return max(u,1e-12)*max(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(min(1.0*theta/d, 50))\n\nm_b = chem_pot(1.5, 0.0)\n\n# Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} factor (geometric correction)\ndef rhs_geo(y, Da, Bj, Bc, Bt):\n    J,u,th = max(y[0],0.16), max(y[1],1e-12), y[2]\n    J23 = J**(2./3.)\n    m = chem_pot(J, th)\n    R = rxn(u, th, J)\n    dJdt = -Bj * J23 * (m - m_b)\n    dJudt = Bc * J23 * (1-u) - Da*J*R\n    dudt = (dJudt - u*dJdt)/J\n    dthdt = Da*R - Bt*J23*th\n    return np.array([dJdt, dudt, dthdt])\n\ndef jac(y, **kw):\n    f0 = rhs_geo(y, **kw)\n    J = np.zeros((3,3))\n    for i in range(3):\n        yp = y.copy(); h = max(1e-7, 1e-5*abs(y[i]))\n        yp[i] += h\n        J[:,i] = (rhs_geo(yp, **kw) - f0) / h\n    return J\n\nprint(\"With J^{2/3} geometric factor in volume exchange:\")\nprint(\"=\"*60)\n\n# This should reproduce the 0D result\nfor Bj, Bc, Bt in [(1.0,1.0,0.8), (0.5,0.5,0.5), (2.0,2.0,1.5)]:\n    print(f\"\\n  Bj={Bj}, Bc={Bc}, Bt={Bt}:\")\n    for Da in np.arange(1, 10, 0.5):\n        kw = dict(Da=Da, Bj=Bj, Bc=Bc, Bt=Bt)\n        ss = None\n        for g in [(0.35,0.5,1.7),(0.5,0.3,1.0),(1.0,0.5,0.5),(1.5,0.2,0.3)]:\n            try:\n                sol = fsolve(lambda y: rhs_geo(y,**kw), list(g), full_output=True)\n                x = sol[0]\n                if sol[2]==1 and x[0]>0.16 and x[1]>0:\n                    if ss is None or x[0]<ss[0]: ss=x\n            except: pass\n        if ss is None: continue\n        J = jac(ss, **kw)\n        ev = np.linalg.eigvals(J)\n        mr = max(np.real(ev))\n        hi = any(abs(np.imag(ev))>1e-6)\n        if hi and abs(mr)<0.3:\n            print(f\"    Da={Da:4.1f}: J={ss[0]:.3f} u={ss[1]:.3f} \u03b8={ss[2]:.3f} \"\n                  f\"max_re={mr:+.4f} {'*** HOPF ***' if mr>0 else 'near-Hopf'}\")\n\n# Also time-integrate to verify\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\nprint(\"\\n\\nTime integration with Bj=1, Bc=1, Bt=0.8, Da=2.5:\")\nkw = dict(Da=2.5, Bj=1.0, Bc=1.0, Bt=0.8)\nsol = solve_ivp(lambda t,y: rhs_geo(y,**kw), (0,1000), [0.35,0.5,1.7],\n                method=\"BDF\", rtol=1e-8, atol=1e-10, t_eval=np.linspace(0,1000,5000))\nif sol.success:\n    from scipy.signal import find_peaks\n    th = sol.y[2, 2500:]\n    pks,_ = find_peaks(th-np.mean(th), prominence=0.01)\n    amp = np.max(th)-np.min(th)\n    print(f\"  J_final={sol.y[0,-1]:.3f}, \u03b8 range=[{np.min(th):.3f},{np.max(th):.3f}], \"\n          f\"amp={amp:.3f}, peaks={len(pks)}\")\nPYEOF\n",
      "description": "Check if J^{2/3} geometric factor is the missing ingredient"
    },
    "message": "Check if J^{2/3} geometric factor is the missing ingredient",

      "json_block": "{\"language\": \"bash\", \"code\": \"cd /home/claude && timeout 60 python3 << 'PYEOF'\\nimport numpy as np\\nfrom scipy.optimize import fsolve\\n\\ndef phi_of_J(J): return 0.15 / max(J, 0.16)\\n\\ndef chem_pot(J, theta):\\n    phi = phi_of_J(J)\\n    chi = 0.40 + 0.50*theta + 0.80*phi\\n    return np.log(max(1-phi,1e-15)) + phi + chi*phi**2 + 0.10*(J**(-1./3.) - 1./J)\\n\\ndef rxn(u, theta, J):\\n    phi = phi_of_J(J)\\n    d = 1+0.03*max(theta,-30.)\\n    return max(u,1e-12)*max(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(min(1.0*theta/d, 50))\\n\\nm_b = chem_pot(1.5, 0.0)\\n\\n# Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} factor (geometric correction)\\ndef rhs_geo(y, Da, Bj, Bc, Bt):\\n    J,u,th = max(y[0],0.16), max(y[1],1e-12), y[2]\\n    J23 = J**(2./3.)\\n    m = chem_pot(J, th)\\n    R = rxn(u, th, J)\\n    dJdt = -Bj * J23 * (m - m_b)\\n    dJudt = Bc * J23 * (1-u) - Da*J*R\\n    dudt = (dJudt - u*dJdt)/J\\n    dthdt = Da*R - Bt*J23*th\\n    return np.array([dJdt, dudt, dthdt])\\n\\ndef jac(y, **kw):\\n    f0 = rhs_geo(y, **kw)\\n    J = np.zeros((3,3))\\n    for i in range(3):\\n        yp = y.copy(); h = max(1e-7, 1e-5*abs(y[i]))\\n        yp[i] += h\\n        J[:,i] = (rhs_geo(yp, **kw) - f0) / h\\n    return J\\n\\nprint(\\\"With J^{2/3} geometric factor in volume exchange:\\\")\\nprint(\\\"=\\\"*60)\\n\\n# This should reproduce the 0D result\\nfor Bj, Bc, Bt in [(1.0,1.0,0.8), (0.5,0.5,0.5), (2.0,2.0,1.5)]:\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n  Bj={Bj}, Bc={Bc}, Bt={Bt}:\\\")\\n    for Da in np.arange(1, 10, 0.5):\\n        kw = dict(Da=Da, Bj=Bj, Bc=Bc, Bt=Bt)\\n        ss = None\\n        for g in [(0.35,0.5,1.7),(0.5,0.3,1.0),(1.0,0.5,0.5),(1.5,0.2,0.3)]:\\n            try:\\n                sol = fsolve(lambda y: rhs_geo(y,**kw), list(g), full_output=True)\\n                x = sol[0]\\n                if sol[2]==1 and x[0]>0.16 and x[1]>0:\\n                    if ss is None or x[0]<ss[0]: ss=x\\n            except: pass\\n        if ss is None: continue\\n        J = jac(ss, **kw)\\n        ev = np.linalg.eigvals(J)\\n        mr = max(np.real(ev))\\n        hi = any(abs(np.imag(ev))>1e-6)\\n        if hi and abs(mr)<0.3:\\n            print(f\\\"    Da={Da:4.1f}: J={ss[0]:.3f} u={ss[1]:.3f} \\u03b8={ss[2]:.3f} \\\"\\n                  f\\\"max_re={mr:+.4f} {'*** HOPF ***' if mr>0 else 'near-Hopf'}\\\")\\n\\n# Also time-integrate to verify\\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\\nprint(\\\"\\\\n\\\\nTime integration with Bj=1, Bc=1, Bt=0.8, Da=2.5:\\\")\\nkw = dict(Da=2.5, Bj=1.0, Bc=1.0, Bt=0.8)\\nsol = solve_ivp(lambda t,y: rhs_geo(y,**kw), (0,1000), [0.35,0.5,1.7],\\n                method=\\\"BDF\\\", rtol=1e-8, atol=1e-10, t_eval=np.linspace(0,1000,5000))\\nif sol.success:\\n    from scipy.signal import find_peaks\\n    th = sol.y[2, 2500:]\\n    pks,_ = find_peaks(th-np.mean(th), prominence=0.01)\\n    amp = np.max(th)-np.min(th)\\n    print(f\\\"  J_final={sol.y[0,-1]:.3f}, \\u03b8 range=[{np.min(th):.3f},{np.max(th):.3f}], \\\"\\n          f\\\"amp={amp:.3f}, peaks={len(pks)}\\\")\\nPYEOF\\n\"}"
    },

    "thinking": "The J^{2/3} geometric factor is indeed the key. Without it, no Hopf. With it, clear Hopf bifurcation.\n\nNow I need to implement this in 1D: a volume-distributed exchange term that includes the J^{2/3} factor. Physically, this represents a porous gel where the solvent exchange rate at each material point is proportional to the local surface area (which scales as J^{2/3}).\n\nThis is physically reasonable! In a porous gel with interconnected channels, each local volume element exchanges solvent not just with its neighbors but through the pore network with the bath. The exchange rate depends on the local pore geometry, which scales with the local swelling.\n\n\nNow I'm modifying the 1D equations to incorporate volume-distributed exchange terms with the J^{2/3} scaling for the deformation gradient, chemical potential, and temperature fields.       "command": "cd /home/claude && timeout 120 python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil, time\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use(\"Agg\")\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\n\n# Key discovery: J^{2/3} geometric factor is essential for Hopf.\n# Add volume exchange WITH J^{2/3}: physically = pore-network exchange.\n\n@dataclass\nclass P:\n    N:int=41; t_end:float=800.; n_save:int=6000\n    method:str=\"BDF\"; rtol:float=1e-6; atol:float=1e-8; max_step:float=0.3\n    phi_p0:float=0.15; chi_inf:float=0.40; S_chi:float=0.50; chi1:float=0.80\n    Omega_e:float=0.10; ell:float=0.005\n    Da:float=2.5; delta:float=0.10; alpha:float=0.30\n    Gamma_A:float=1.0; eps_T:float=0.03; arrh_cap:float=50.\n    m_act:float=4.0; m_diff:float=2.0; m_mob:float=1.0\n    Bi_mu:float=1.0; Bi_c:float=1.0; Bi_T:float=0.80\n    # Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} geometric factor\n    Bi_J_vol:float=0.0; Bi_c_vol:float=0.0; B_Tvol:float=0.0\n    m_b:float=0.0; auto_m_b:bool=True\n    M0:float=1.; D0:float=1.; C0:float=1.; K0:float=1.\n    J_init:float=1.5; J_start:float=0.35; u_init:float=0.5; theta_init:float=1.7\n    eps_pert:float=0.02\n\n_LJM=np.log(8.)\n\nclass Grid:\n    def __init__(s,N):\n        s.N=N;s.dR=1./N;s.R_f=np.linspace(0,1,N+1);s.R_c=.5*(s.R_f[:-1]+s.R_f[1:])\n        s.R2_f=s.R_f**2;s.V=(s.R_f[1:]**3-s.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.;s.V_safe=np.maximum(s.V,1e-30)\n    def div(s,f): return (s.R2_f[1:]*f[1:]-s.R2_f[:-1]*f[:-1])/s.V_safe\n\ndef phi_f(J): return np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,0.999)\ndef hm(a,b): return 2*a*b/np.maximum(a+b,1e-30)\n\ndef m_loc(J,th):\n    phi=phi_f(J); chi=0.40+0.50*th+0.80*phi\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi,1e-15))+phi+chi*phi**2+0.10*(J**(-1./3.)-1./J)\n\ndef rxn(u,th,J):\n    phi=phi_f(J); d=1+0.03*np.maximum(th,-30.)\n    return np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\n\ndef finalize(p):\n    if p.auto_m_b:\n        p=replace(p, m_b=float(m_loc(np.array([p.J_init]),np.array([0.]))[0]))\n    return p\n\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\n    N=p.N; dR=g.dR; ljmin=np.log(0.153)\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],ljmin,_LJM); W=y[N:2*N]; th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\n    J=np.exp(lJ); u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12); phi=phi_f(J)\n    \n    ml=m_loc(J,th)\n    gJ=np.zeros(N+1); gJ[1:N]=(J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\n    m=ml-p.ell**2*g.div(gJ)\n    \n    q=np.zeros(N+1)\n    Mc=p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_mob\n    Mf=hm(Mc[:-1],Mc[1:])\n    q[1:N]=-Mf*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR\n    q[N]=p.Bi_mu*(m[-1]-p.m_b)\n    \n    J23 = J**(2./3.)\n    lJt = -g.div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(ml-p.m_b)/J\n    \n    R_=rxn(u,th,J)\n    \n    nf=np.zeros(N+1)\n    Dc=p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_diff; Df=hm(Dc[:-1],Dc[1:])\n    qi=q[1:N]; uu=np.where(qi>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])\n    nf[1:N]=qi*uu-p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\n    nf[N]=p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.)\n    Wt = -g.div(nf) - p.Da*J*R_ + p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\n    \n    h=np.zeros(N+1)\n    h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\n    h[N]=p.Bi_T*th[-1]\n    tht = (-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*J23*th\n    \n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\n\ndef mksp(N):\n    sz=3*N;S=lil_matrix((sz,sz))\n    for kr,kc,w in [(0,0,2),(0,2,1),(1,0,2),(1,1,1),(1,2,1),(2,2,1)]:\n        for i in range(N):\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\n                j=i+dj\n                if 0<=j<N: S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.\n    return csc_matrix(S)\n\ndef simulate(p):\n    p=finalize(p); g=Grid(p.N); R=g.R_c\n    J0=p.J_start+p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R)\n    u0=p.u_init+0.05*(1-R); th0=p.theta_init+0.05*(1-R**2)\n    J0=np.maximum(J0,0.16); u0=np.maximum(u0,1e-12)\n    y0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\n    \n    rhs_fn=lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g)\n    t0=time.perf_counter()\n    sol=solve_ivp(rhs_fn,(0,p.t_end),y0,jac_sparsity=mksp(p.N),\n                  method=p.method,t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),\n                  rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\n    el=time.perf_counter()-t0\n    if not sol.success: raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\n    N=p.N; Js=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],np.log(0.153),_LJM))\n    Ws=sol.y[N:2*N]; ths=sol.y[2*N:]\n    us=np.maximum(Ws/Js,1e-12)\n    return {\"t\":sol.t,\"J\":Js,\"u\":us,\"theta\":ths,\"grid\":g,\"elapsed\":el}\n\ndef va(f,g):\n    w=g.V/np.sum(g.V); return np.sum(f*w[:,None],axis=0)\n\ndef osc(t,y):\n    i0=int(len(t)*.5); tt,yy=t[i0:],y[i0:]\n    if len(tt)<30: return {\"osc\":False,\"amp\":0,\"T\":np.nan,\"np\":0}\n    yd=yy-np.polyval(np.polyfit(tt,yy,1),tt)\n    amp=float(np.max(yd)-np.min(yd))\n    pks,_=find_peaks(yd,prominence=max(.15*amp,1e-3),distance=max(3,len(yd)//20))\n    T=float(np.mean(np.diff(tt[pks]))) if len(pks)>=2 else np.nan\n    return {\"osc\":amp>1e-3 and len(pks)>=2,\"amp\":amp,\"T\":T,\"np\":len(pks)}\n\noutdir=\"/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc\"\nos.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\n\nprint(\"=\"*70)\nprint(\"Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} geometric factor\")\nprint(\"=\"*70)\n\ncases = [\n    (\"geo_D2.5\",  2.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"geo_D3.0\",  3.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"geo_D4.0\",  4.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"geo_D5.0\",  5.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"geo_D3_b5\", 3.0, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5),\n    (\"geo_D4_b5\", 4.0, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5),\n    (\"geo_D5_b2\", 5.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\n    (\"geo_D7_b2\", 7.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\n]\n\nbest_case = None\nbest_amp = 0\n\nfor label, Da, Bj, Bc, Bt in cases:\n    pp = P(N=41, t_end=800, Da=Da, Bi_J_vol=Bj, Bi_c_vol=Bc, B_Tvol=Bt)\n    try:\n        d = simulate(pp)\n        g = d[\"grid\"]\n        thm = va(d[\"theta\"],g); Jm = va(d[\"J\"],g)\n        o = osc(d[\"t\"], thm)\n        Jf=np.mean(d[\"J\"][:,-1]); thf=np.mean(d[\"theta\"][:,-1])\n        Jstd=np.std(d[\"J\"][:,-1])\n        s=\"OSC\" if o[\"osc\"] else \"stab\"\n        print(f\"  {label:18s}: {s} J={Jf:.3f}\u00b1{Jstd:.3f} \u03b8={thf:.3f} \"\n              f\"amp={o['amp']:.3f} T={o.get('T',0):.1f} [{d['elapsed']:.1f}s]\")\n        if o[\"osc\"] and o[\"amp\"] > best_amp:\n            best_amp = o[\"amp\"]; best_case = (label, pp, d)\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"  {label:18s}: FAIL {str(e)[:50]}\")\n\nif best_case:\n    label, pp, d = best_case\n    g = d[\"grid\"]; t = d[\"t\"]\n    Jm=va(d[\"J\"],g); um=va(d[\"u\"],g); thm=va(d[\"theta\"],g)\n    Jstd=np.sqrt(va((d[\"J\"]-Jm[None,:])**2,g))\n    thstd=np.sqrt(va((d[\"theta\"]-thm[None,:])**2,g))\n    \n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(4,1,figsize=(14,14),sharex=True)\n    axes[0].plot(t,Jm,'b',lw=0.8); axes[0].fill_between(t,Jm-Jstd,Jm+Jstd,alpha=.2,color='b')\n    axes[0].set_ylabel(\"<J>\"); axes[0].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    axes[0].set_title(f\"1D Sphere OSCILLATION: {label}\")\n    axes[1].plot(t,um,'orange',lw=0.8); axes[1].set_ylabel(\"<u>\"); axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    axes[2].plot(t,thm,'r',lw=0.8); axes[2].fill_between(t,thm-thstd,thm+thstd,alpha=.2,color='r')\n    axes[2].set_ylabel(\"<\u03b8>\"); axes[2].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    axes[3].plot(t,Jstd,'b--',lw=0.8,label=\"std(J)\"); axes[3].plot(t,thstd,'r--',lw=0.8,label=\"std(\u03b8)\")\n    axes[3].set_xlabel(\"t\"); axes[3].set_ylabel(\"spatial std\"); axes[3].legend(); axes[3].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/timeseries_best.png\",dpi=150); plt.close(fig)\n    \n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(15,4.5))\n    for ax,fld,nm,cm in [(axes[0],d[\"J\"],\"J\",\"viridis\"),(axes[1],d[\"theta\"],\"\u03b8\",\"hot\"),(axes[2],d[\"u\"],\"u\",\"YlOrRd\")]:\n        im=ax.pcolormesh(t,g.R_c,fld,shading=\"auto\",cmap=cm)\n        ax.set_xlabel(\"t\");ax.set_ylabel(\"R\");ax.set_title(nm);fig.colorbar(im,ax=ax)\n    fig.suptitle(f\"Kymograph: {label}\",fontweight=\"bold\")\n    fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/kymograph_best.png\",dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\n    \n    # Phase portrait\n    i0=int(len(t)*0.5)\n    fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(7,6))\n    ax.plot(Jm[:i0],thm[:i0],'gray',lw=0.3,alpha=0.4)\n    ax.plot(Jm[i0:],thm[i0:],'b-',lw=1)\n    ax.set_xlabel(\"<J>\"); ax.set_ylabel(\"<\u03b8>\"); ax.set_title(\"Phase portrait\")\n    ax.grid(True,alpha=0.3)\n    fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/phase_best.png\",dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\n    \n    print(f\"\\n  BEST: {label}, plots saved\")\n\nout_final=\"/mnt/user-data/outputs/sphere_geo_osc\"\nif os.path.exists(out_final): shutil.rmtree(out_final)\nshutil.copytree(outdir,out_final)\nprint(f\"\\n\u2192 {out_final}\")\nPYEOF\n",

t_end:float=800.; n_save:int=6000\\n    method:str=\\\"BDF\\\"; rtol:float=1e-6; atol:float=1e-8; max_step:float=0.3\\n    phi_p0:float=0.15; chi_inf:float=0.40; S_chi:float=0.50; chi1:float=0.80\\n    Omega_e:float=0.10; ell:float=0.005\\n    Da:float=2.5; delta:float=0.10; alpha:float=0.30\\n    Gamma_A:float=1.0; eps_T:float=0.03; arrh_cap:float=50.\\n    m_act:float=4.0; m_diff:float=2.0; m_mob:float=1.0\\n    Bi_mu:float=1.0; Bi_c:float=1.0; Bi_T:float=0.80\\n    # Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} geometric factor\\n    Bi_J_vol:float=0.0; Bi_c_vol:float=0.0; B_Tvol:float=0.0\\n    m_b:float=0.0; auto_m_b:bool=True\\n    M0:float=1.; D0:float=1.; C0:float=1.; K0:float=1.\\n    J_init:float=1.5; J_start:float=0.35; u_init:float=0.5; theta_init:float=1.7\\n    eps_pert:float=0.02\\n\\n_LJM=np.log(8.)\\n\\nclass Grid:\\n    def __init__(s,N):\\n        s.N=N;s.dR=1./N;s.R_f=np.linspace(0,1,N+1);s.R_c=.5*(s.R_f[:-1]+s.R_f[1:])\\n        s.R2_f=s.R_f**2;s.V=(s.R_f[1:]**3-s.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.;s.V_safe=np.maximum(s.V,1e-30)\\n    def div(s,f): return (s.R2_f[1:]*f[1:]-s.R2_f[:-1]*f[:-1])/s.V_safe\\n\\ndef phi_f(J): return np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,0.999)\\ndef hm(a,b): return 2*a*b/np.maximum(a+b,1e-30)\\n\\ndef m_loc(J,th):\\n    phi=phi_f(J); chi=0.40+0.50*th+0.80*phi\\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi,1e-15))+phi+chi*phi**2+0.10*(J**(-1./3.)-1./J)\\n\\ndef rxn(u,th,J):\\n    phi=phi_f(J); d=1+0.03*np.maximum(th,-30.)\\n    return np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\\n\\ndef finalize(p):\\n    if p.auto_m_b:\\n        p=replace(p, m_b=float(m_loc(np.array([p.J_init]),np.array([0.]))[0]))\\n    return p\\n\\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\\n    N=p.N; dR=g.dR; ljmin=np.log(0.153)\\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],ljmin,_LJM); W=y[N:2*N]; th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\\n    J=np.exp(lJ); u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12); phi=phi_f(J)\\n    \\n    ml=m_loc(J,th)\\n    gJ=np.zeros(N+1); gJ[1:N]=(J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\\n    m=ml-p.ell**2*g.div(gJ)\\n    \\n    q=np.zeros(N+1)\\n    Mc=p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_mob\\n    Mf=hm(Mc[:-1],Mc[1:])\\n    q[1:N]=-Mf*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR\\n    q[N]=p.Bi_mu*(m[-1]-p.m_b)\\n    \\n    J23 = J**(2./3.)\\n    lJt = -g.div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(ml-p.m_b)/J\\n    \\n    R_=rxn(u,th,J)\\n    \\n    nf=np.zeros(N+1)\\n    Dc=p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_diff; Df=hm(Dc[:-1],Dc[1:])\\n    qi=q[1:N]; uu=np.where(qi>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])\\n    nf[1:N]=qi*uu-p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\\n    nf[N]=p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.)\\n    Wt = -g.div(nf) - p.Da*J*R_ + p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\\n    \\n    h=np.zeros(N+1)\\n    h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\\n    h[N]=p.Bi_T*th[-1]\\n    tht = (-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*J23*th\\n    \\n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\\n\\ndef mksp(N):\\n    sz=3*N;S=lil_matrix((sz,sz))\\n    for kr,kc,w in [(0,0,2),(0,2,1),(1,0,2),(1,1,1),(1,2,1),(2,2,1)]:\\n        for i in range(N):\\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\\n                j=i+dj\\n                if 0<=j<N: S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.\\n    return csc_matrix(S)\\n\\ndef simulate(p):\\n    p=finalize(p); g=Grid(p.N); R=g.R_c\\n    J0=p.J_start+p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R)\\n    u0=p.u_init+0.05*(1-R); th0=p.theta_init+0.05*(1-R**2)\\n    J0=np.maximum(J0,0.16); u0=np.maximum(u0,1e-12)\\n    y0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\\n    \\n    rhs_fn=lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g)\\n    t0=time.perf_counter()\\n    sol=solve_ivp(rhs_fn,(0,p.t_end),y0,jac_sparsity=mksp(p.N),\\n                  method=p.method,t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),\\n                  rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\\n    el=time.perf_counter()-t0\\n    if not sol.success: raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\\n    N=p.N; Js=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],np.log(0.153),_LJM))\\n    Ws=sol.y[N:2*N]; ths=sol.y[2*N:]\\n    us=np.maximum(Ws/Js,1e-12)\\n    return {\\\"t\\\":sol.t,\\\"J\\\":Js,\\\"u\\\":us,\\\"theta\\\":ths,\\\"grid\\\":g,\\\"elapsed\\\":el}\\n\\ndef va(f,g):\\n    w=g.V/np.sum(g.V); return np.sum(f*w[:,None],axis=0)\\n\\ndef osc(t,y):\\n    i0=int(len(t)*.5); tt,yy=t[i0:],y[i0:]\\n    if len(tt)<30: return {\\\"osc\\\":False,\\\"amp\\\":0,\\\"T\\\":np.nan,\\\"np\\\":0}\\n    yd=yy-np.polyval(np.polyfit(tt,yy,1),tt)\\n    amp=float(np.max(yd)-np.min(yd))\\n    pks,_=find_peaks(yd,prominence=max(.15*amp,1e-3),distance=max(3,len(yd)//20))\\n    T=float(np.mean(np.diff(tt[pks]))) if len(pks)>=2 else np.nan\\n    return {\\\"osc\\\":amp>1e-3 and len(pks)>=2,\\\"amp\\\":amp,\\\"T\\\":T,\\\"np\\\":len(pks)}\\n\\noutdir=\\\"/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc\\\"\\nos.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\\n\\nprint(\\\"=\\\"*70)\\nprint(\\\"Volume exchange WITH J^{2/3} geometric factor\\\")\\nprint(\\\"=\\\"*70)\\n\\ncases = [\\n    (\\\"geo_D2.5\\\",  2.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\\n    (\\\"geo_D3.0\\\",  3.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\\n    (\\\"geo_D4.0\\\",  4.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\\n    (\\\"geo_D5.0\\\",  5.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\\n    (\\\"geo_D3_b5\\\", 3.0, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5),\\n    (\\\"geo_D4_b5\\\", 4.0, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5),\\n    (\\\"geo_D5_b2\\\", 5.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\\n    (\\\"geo_D7_b2\\\", 7.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\\n]\\n\\nbest_case = None\\nbest_amp = 0\\n\\nfor label, Da, Bj, Bc, Bt in cases:\\n    pp = P(N=41, t_end=800, Da=Da, Bi_J_vol=Bj, Bi_c_vol=Bc, B_Tvol=Bt)\\n    try:\\n        d = simulate(pp)\\n        g = d[\\\"grid\\\"]\\n        thm = va(d[\\\"theta\\\"],g); Jm = va(d[\\\"J\\\"],g)\\n        o = osc(d[\\\"t\\\"], thm)\\n        Jf=np.mean(d[\\\"J\\\"][:,-1]); thf=np.mean(d[\\\"theta\\\"][:,-1])\\n        Jstd=np.std(d[\\\"J\\\"][:,-1])\\n        s=\\\"OSC\\\" if o[\\\"osc\\\"] else \\\"stab\\\"\\n        print(f\\\"  {label:18s}: {s} J={Jf:.3f}\\u00b1{Jstd:.3f} \\u03b8={thf:.3f} \\\"\\n              f\\\"amp={o['amp']:.3f} T={o.get('T',0):.1f} [{d['elapsed']:.1f}s]\\\")\\n        if o[\\\"osc\\\"] and o[\\\"amp\\\"] > best_amp:\\n            best_amp = o[\\\"amp\\\"]; best_case = (label, pp, d)\\n    except Exception as e:\\n        print(f\\\"  {label:18s}: FAIL {str(e)[:50]}\\\")\\n\\nif best_case:\\n    label, pp, d = best_case\\n    g = d[\\\"grid\\\"]; t = d[\\\"t\\\"]\\n    Jm=va(d[\\\"J\\\"],g); um=va(d[\\\"u\\\"],g); thm=va(d[\\\"theta\\\"],g)\\n    Jstd=np.sqrt(va((d[\\\"J\\\"]-Jm[None,:])**2,g))\\n    thstd=np.sqrt(va((d[\\\"theta\\\"]-thm[None,:])**2,g))\\n    \\n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(4,1,figsize=(14,14),sharex=True)\\n    axes[0].plot(t,Jm,'b',lw=0.8); axes[1].set_ylabel(\\\"<u>\\\"); axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    axes[2].plot(t,thm,'r',lw=0.8); axes[2].fill_between(t,thm-thstd,thm+thstd,alpha=.2,color='r')\\n    axes[2].set_ylabel(\\\"<\\u03b8>\\\"); axes[2].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    axes[3].plot(t,Jstd,'b--',lw=0.8,label=\\\"std(J)\\\"); axes[3].plot(t,thstd,'r--',lw=0.8,label=\\\"std(\\u03b8)\\\")\\n    axes[3].set_xlabel(\\\"t\\\"); axes[3].set_ylabel(\\\"spatial std\\\"); globals())\n\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil, time\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use(\"Agg\")\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\n\n@dataclass\nclass P:\n    N:int=41; t_end:float=800.; n_save:int=6000\n    method:str=\"BDF\"; rtol:float=1e-6; atol:float=1e-8; max_step:float=0.3\n    phi_p0:float=0.15; chi_inf:float=0.40; S_chi:float=0.50; chi1:float=0.80\n    Omega_e:float=0.10; ell:float=0.005\n    Da:float=2.5; delta:float=0.10; alpha:float=0.30\n    Gamma_A:float=1.0; eps_T:float=0.03; arrh_cap:float=50.\n    m_act:float=4.0; m_diff:float=2.0; m_mob:float=1.0\n    Bi_mu:float=0.0; Bi_c:float=0.0; Bi_T:float=0.0  # NO surface exchange\n    Bi_J_vol:float=1.0; Bi_c_vol:float=1.0; B_Tvol:float=0.8  # Volume exchange\n    m_b:float=0.0; auto_m_b:bool=True\n    M0:float=1.; D0:float=1.; C0:float=1.; K0:float=1.\n    J_init:float=1.5; J_start:float=0.35; u_init:float=0.5; theta_init:float=1.7\n    eps_pert:float=0.02\n\n_LJM=np.log(8.)\nclass Grid:\n    def __init__(s,N):\n        s.N=N;s.dR=1./N;s.R_f=np.linspace(0,1,N+1);s.R_c=.5*(s.R_f[:-1]+s.R_f[1:])\n        s.R2_f=s.R_f**2;s.V=(s.R_f[1:]**3-s.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.;s.V_safe=np.maximum(s.V,1e-30)\n    def div(s,f): return (s.R2_f[1:]*f[1:]-s.R2_f[:-1]*f[:-1])/s.V_safe\ndef phi_f(J): return np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,0.999)\ndef hm(a,b): return 2*a*b/np.maximum(a+b,1e-30)\ndef m_loc(J,th):\n    phi=phi_f(J);chi=0.40+0.50*th+0.80*phi\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi,1e-15))+phi+chi*phi**2+0.10*(J**(-1./3.)-1./J)\ndef rxn(u,th,J):\n    phi=phi_f(J);d=1+0.03*np.maximum(th,-30.)\n    return np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\ndef finalize(p):\n    if p.auto_m_b: p=replace(p,m_b=float(m_loc(np.array([p.J_init]),np.array([0.]))[0]))\n    return p\n\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\n    N=p.N;dR=g.dR;ljmin=np.log(0.153)\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],ljmin,_LJM);W=y[N:2*N];th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\n    J=np.exp(lJ);u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12);phi=phi_f(J)\n    ml=m_loc(J,th)\n    gJ=np.zeros(N+1);gJ[1:N]=(J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\n    m=ml-p.ell**2*g.div(gJ)\n    q=np.zeros(N+1)\n    Mc=p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_mob;Mf=hm(Mc[:-1],Mc[1:])\n    q[1:N]=-Mf*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR\n    q[N]=p.Bi_mu*(m[-1]-p.m_b)\n    J23=J**(2./3.)\n    lJt=-g.div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(ml-p.m_b)/J\n    R_=rxn(u,th,J)\n    nf=np.zeros(N+1)\n    Dc=p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_diff;Df=hm(Dc[:-1],Dc[1:])\n    qi=q[1:N];uu=np.where(qi>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])\n    nf[1:N]=qi*uu-p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\n    nf[N]=p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.)\n    Wt=-g.div(nf)-p.Da*J*R_+p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\n    h=np.zeros(N+1);h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR;h[N]=p.Bi_T*th[-1]\n    tht=(-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0-p.B_Tvol*J23*th\n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\n\ndef mksp(N):\n    sz=3*N;S=lil_matrix((sz,sz))\n    for kr,kc,w in [(0,0,2),(0,2,1),(1,0,2),(1,1,1),(1,2,1),(2,2,1)]:\n        for i in range(N):\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\n                j=i+dj\n                if 0<=j<N: S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.\n    return csc_matrix(S)\n\ndef simulate(p):\n    p=finalize(p);g=Grid(p.N);R=g.R_c\n    J0=p.J_start+p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R)\n    u0=p.u_init+0.05*(1-R);th0=p.theta_init+0.05*(1-R**2)\n    J0=np.maximum(J0,0.16);u0=np.maximum(u0,1e-12)\n    y0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\n    rhs_fn=lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g)\n    sol=solve_ivp(rhs_fn,(0,p.t_end),y0,jac_sparsity=mksp(p.N),\n                  method=p.method,t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),\n                  rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\n    if not sol.success: raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\n    N=p.N;Js=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],np.log(0.153),_LJM))\n    return {\"t\":sol.t,\"J\":Js,\"u\":np.maximum(sol.y[N:2*N]/Js,1e-12),\n            \"theta\":sol.y[2*N:],\"grid\":g}\n\ndef va(f,g): w=g.V/np.sum(g.V); return np.sum(f*w[:,None],axis=0)\n\noutdir=\"/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc\"\nos.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\n\nprint(\"=\"*70)\nprint(\"NO surface exchange, ONLY volume exchange with J^{2/3}\")\nprint(\"=\"*70)\n\ncases=[\n    (\"nosurf_D2.5\",  2.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D3.0\",  3.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D4.0\",  4.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D5.0\",  5.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D6.0\",  6.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D8.0\",  8.0, 1.0, 1.0, 0.8),\n    (\"nosurf_D4_b2\", 4.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\n    (\"nosurf_D6_b2\", 6.0, 2.0, 2.0, 1.5),\n]\n\nbest=None; best_amp=0\nfor label,Da,Bj,Bc,Bt in cases:\n    pp=P(N=41,t_end=800,Da=Da,Bi_J_vol=Bj,Bi_c_vol=Bc,B_Tvol=Bt,\n         Bi_mu=0,Bi_c=0,Bi_T=0)  # NO surface exchange\n    try:\n        d=simulate(pp);g=d[\"grid\"]\n        thm=va(d[\"theta\"],g);Jm=va(d[\"J\"],g)\n        i0=int(len(d[\"t\"])*.5);tt,yy=d[\"t\"][i0:],thm[i0:]\n        amp=float(np.max(yy)-np.min(yy)) if if len(pks)>=2 else np.nan\n        Jf=np.mean(d[\"J\"][:,-1]);thf=np.mean(d[\"theta\"][:,-1])\n        Jstd=np.std(d[\"J\"][:,-1])\n        s=\"OSC\" if is_osc else \"stab\"\n        print(f\"  {label:20s}: {s} J={Jf:.3f}\u00b1{Jstd:.4f} \u03b8={thf:.3f} amp={amp:.3f} T={T:.1f} [{len(pks)}pk]\")\n        if is_osc and amp>best_amp: best=(label,pp,d,amp,T); best_amp=amp\n    except Exception axes[0].plot(t,Jm,'b',lw=.8);axes[0].fill_between(t,Jm-Jstd,Jm+Jstd,alpha=.2,color='b')\n    axes[0].set_ylabel(\"<J>\");axes[0].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    axes[0].set_title(f\"1D Sphere OSCILLATION (vol J^{{2/3}}): {label}, amp={amp:.3f}, T={T:.1f}\")\n    axes[1].plot(t,um,'orange',lw=.8);axes[1].set_ylabel(\"<u>\");axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n axes[3].plot(t,Jstd,'b--',lw=.8,label=\"std(J)\");axes[3].set_xlabel(\"t\");axes[3].set_ylabel(\"std\")\n    axes[3].legend();axes[3].grid(True,alpha=.3)\n    fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f\"{outdir}/ts_best.png\",dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\n    \n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(15,4.5))\n    for ax,fld,nm,cm in ax.set_xlabel(\"t\");ax.set_ylabel(\"R\");ax.set_title(nm);fig.colorbar(im,ax=ax)\n    fig.suptitle(f\"Kymograph: {label}\",fontweight=\"bold\")\n ax.plot(Jm[:i0],thm[:i0],'gray',lw=.3,alpha=.4)\n    ax.plot(Jm[i0:],thm[i0:],'b-',lw=1)\n    ax.set_xlabel(\"<J>\");ax.set_ylabel(\"<\u03b8>\");ax.set_title(\"Limit cycle\");ax.grid(True,alpha=.3)\n np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\\ndef fp(p):\\n    if p.auto_m_b:p=replace(p,m_b=float(ml(np.array([p.J_init]),np.array([0.]))[0]))\\n    return p\\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\\n    N=p.N;dR=g.dR;lm=np.log(0.153)\\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],lm,_L);W=y[N:2*N];th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\\n    J=np.exp(lJ);u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12);phi=pf(J)\\n    m=ml(J,th);gJ=np.zeros(N+1);gJ[1:N]=(J[1:]-J[:-1])/dR\\n    mc=m-p.ell**2*g.div(gJ)\\n    q=np.zeros(N+1);Mc=p.M0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_mob;Mf=hm(Mc[:-1],Mc[1:])\\n    q[1:N]=-Mf*(mc[1:]-mc[:-1])/dR;q[N]=p.Bi_mu*(mc[-1]-p.m_b)\\n    J23=J**(2./3.)\\n    lJt=-g.div(q)/J-p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(m-p.m_b)/J\\n    R_=rx(u,th,J)\\n    nf=np.zeros(N+1);Dc=p.D0*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**p.m_diff;Df=hm(Dc[:-1],Dc[1:])\\n    qi=q[1:N];uu=np.where(qi>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])\\n    nf[1:N]=qi*uu-p.delta*Df*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR;nf[N]=p.Bi_c*(u[-1]-1.)\\n    Wt=-g.div(nf)-p.Da*J*R_+p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\\n    h=np.zeros(N+1);h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR;h[N]=p.Bi_T*th[-1]\\n    tht=(-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0-p.B_Tvol*J23*th\\n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\\ndef mksp(N):\\n    sz=3*N;S=lil_matrix((sz,sz))\\n    for kr,kc,w in[(0,0,2),(0,2,1),(1,0,2),(1,1,1),(1,2,1),(2,2,1)]:\\n        for i in range(N):\\n            for dj in range(-w,w+1):\\n                j=i+dj\\n                if 0<=j<N:S[kr*N+i,kc*N+j]=1.\\n    return csc_matrix(S)\\ndef sim(p):\\n    p=fp(p);g=G(p.N);R=g.R_c\\n    J0=p.J_start+p.eps_pert*np.cos(np.pi*R);u0=p.u_init+.05*(1-R);th0=p.theta_init+.05*(1-R**2)\\n    J0=np.maximum(J0,.16);u0=np.maximum(u0,1e-12)\\n    y0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\\n    sol=solve_ivp(lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g),(0,p.t_end),y0,jac_sparsity=mksp(p.N),\\n                  method=p.method,t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),rtol=p.rtol,atol=p.atol,max_step=p.max_step)\\n    if not sol.success:raise RuntimeError(sol.message)\\n    N=p.N;Js=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:N],np.log(.153),_L))\\n    return{'t':sol.t,'J':Js,'u':np.maximum(sol.y[N:2*N]/Js,1e-12),'theta':sol.y[2*N:],'grid':g}\\ndef va(f,g):w=g.V/np.sum(g.V);return np.sum(f*w[:,None],axis=0)\\n\\noutdir='/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc';os.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\\nprint('No surface, only vol J^{2/3}:')\\nbest=None;best_amp=0\\nfor label,Da,Bj,Bc,Bt in[\\n    ('D2.5',2.5,1,1,.8),('D3',3,1,1,.8),('D4',4,1,1,.8),('D5',5,1,1,.8),\\n    ('D6',6,1,1,.8),('D8',8,1,1,.8),('D4_b2',4,2,2,1.5),('D6_b2',6,2,2,1.5),\\n]:\\n    pp=fp(P(Da=Da,Bi_J_vol=Bj,Bi_c_vol=Bc,B_Tvol=Bt))\\n    try:\\n        d=sim(pp);g=d['grid'];thm=va(d['theta'],g)\\n        i0=int(len(d['t'])*.5);amp=float(np.max(thm[i0:])-np.min(thm[i0:]))\\n        pks,_=find_peaks(thm[i0:]-np.mean(thm[i0:]),prominence=max(.1*amp,.001),distance=max(3,len(thm[i0:])//20))\\n        T=float(np.mean(np.diff(d['t'][i0:][pks])))if len(pks)>=2 else 0\\n        s='OSC'if amp>.001 and len(pks)>=2 else'stab'\\n        Jf=np.mean(d['J'][:,-1])\\n        print(f'  {label:10s}:{s} J={Jf:.3f} amp={amp:.3f} T={T:.1f} pk={len(pks)}')\\n        if s=='OSC'and amp>best_amp:best=(label,pp,d,amp,T);best_amp=amp\\n    except Exception as e:print(f'  {label:10s}:FAIL {str(e)[:40]}')\\n\\nif best:\\n    label,pp,d,amp,T=best\\n    g=d['grid'];t=d['t'];Jm=va(d['J'],g);thm=va(d['theta'],g);um=va(d['u'],g)\\n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(4,1,figsize=(14,13),sharex=True)\\n    axes[0].plot(t,Jm,'b',lw=.8);axes[0].set_ylabel('<J>');axes[0].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    axes[0].set_title(f'1D Sphere OSC: {label} amp={amp:.3f} T={T:.1f}')\\n    axes[1].plot(t,um,'orange',lw=.8);axes[1].set_ylabel('<u>');axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    axes[2].plot(t,thm,'r',lw=.8);axes[2].set_ylabel('<th>');axes[2].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    Jstd=np.sqrt(va((d['J']-Jm[None,:])**2,g))\\n    axes[3].plot(t,Jstd,'b--',lw=.8);axes[3].set_xlabel('t');axes[3].set_ylabel('std(J)');axes[3].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f'{outdir}/ts_best.png',dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\\n    fig,axes=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(15,4.5))\\n    for ax,fld,nm,cm in[(axes[0],d['J'],'J','viridis'),(axes[1],d['theta'],'th','hot'),(axes[2],d['u'],'u','YlOrRd')]:\\n        im=ax.pcolormesh(t,g.R_c,fld,shading='auto',cmap=cm);ax.set_xlabel('t');ax.set_ylabel('R');ax.set_title(nm);fig.colorbar(im,ax=ax)\\n    fig.suptitle(f'{label}',fontweight='bold');fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f'{outdir}/kymo_best.png',dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\\n    i0=int(len(t)*.5)\\n    fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(7,6))\\n    ax.plot(Jm[:i0],thm[:i0],'gray',lw=.3,alpha=.4);ax.plot(Jm[i0:],thm[i0:],'b-',lw=1)\\n    ax.set_xlabel('<J>');ax.set_ylabel('<th>');ax.set_title('Limit cycle');ax.grid(True,alpha=.3)\\n    fig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f'{outdir}/phase_best.png',dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\\n    print(f'Best: {label}')\\n\\nout_final='/mnt/user-data/outputs/sphere_geo_osc'\\nif os.path.exists(out_final):shutil.rmtree(out_final)\\nshutil.copytree(outdir,out_final)\\nprint(f'-> {out_final}')\\n\\\" 2>&1\\n\"}"

    "type": "thinking",
    "thinking": "Still no oscillation! The system converges to J~1.25-1.27, which is the swollen branch. The initial condition starts at J=0.35 (collapsed), but internal solvent diffusion (M_cell * gradient of chemical potential) quickly drives the system to the swollen state despite the volume exchange.\n\nThe root cause is clear now: even without surface exchange, the **internal solvent diffusion** (the q[1:N] terms from chemical potential gradients between cells) acts as a homogenizing mechanism. When the system starts uniform at J=0.35, any small perturbation creates a chemical potential gradient that drives solvent flow, and the system evolves to the stable swollen state.\n \nI'm wondering if the perturbation itself is driving this behavior. With a truly uniform initial condition, there shouldn't be any internal gradients to trigger diffusion, so the k=0 mode should behave like the 0D model. Let me test with zero perturbation to see if that changes things. The BDF solver might be introducing small numerical perturbations that grow if the swollen state is more stable, but I need to isolate whether the initial perturbation or the internal diffusion mechanism is the real culprit here.\n\nNow I'm realizing the core issue: the 0D model oscillates because it's trapped near the Hopf-unstable collapsed state with no escape route, but in 1D there are two competing attractors\u2014the collapsed limit cycle and the swollen steady state. Even tiny numerical perturbations can push the system toward the swollen basin, and since diffusion stabilizes that state against spatial perturbations, the system gets locked in. The question is whether both attractors truly coexist in the 1D system, or if the collapsed basin is so small that it's effectively unreachable from my initial conditions.\n\nI should test this by running the simulation with truly minimal perturbations to see if I can keep it in the collapsed regime.",

      "command": "cd /home/claude && timeout 60 python3 -c \"\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use('Agg')\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\n\n# Minimal test: truly uniform IC, no surface exchange, volume J^{2/3}\n# Should exactly reproduce 0D for k=0 mode\n\n@dataclass\nclass P:\n    N:int=5  # very coarse to minimize spatial modes\n    t_end:float=800.; n_save:int=6000\n    Da:float=2.5; Bi_J_vol:float=1.0; Bi_c_vol:float=1.0; B_Tvol:float=0.8\n    Bi_mu:float=0.; Bi_c:float=0.; Bi_T:float=0.  # no surface\n    alpha:float=50.; delta:float=20.  # VERY fast diffusion = near-uniform\n    ell:float=0.0; Omega_e:float=0.10; phi_p0:float=0.15\n    chi_inf:float=0.40;S_chi:float=0.50;chi1:float=0.80\n    Gamma_A:float=1.0;eps_T:float=0.03;m_act:float=4.0\n    m_diff:float=0.;m_mob:float=0.  # constant coefficients\n    M0:float=1.;D0:float=1.;C0:float=1.;K0:float=1.\n\n_L=np.log(8.)\nclass G:\n    def __init__(s,N):\n        s.N=N;s.dR=1./N;s.R_f=np.linspace(0,1,N+1);s.R_c=.5*(s.R_f[:-1]+s.R_f[1:])\n        s.R2_f=s.R_f**2;s.V=(s.R_f[1:]**3-s.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.;s.Vs=np.maximum(s.V,1e-30)\n    def div(s,f):return(s.R2_f[1:]*f[1:]-s.R2_f[:-1]*f[:-1])/s.Vs\n\ndef ml(J,th):\n    phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\n    chi=0.40+0.50*th+0.80*phi\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi,1e-15))+phi+chi*phi**2+0.10*(J**(-1./3.)-1./J)\n\ndef rx(u,th,J):\n    phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\n    d=1+0.03*np.maximum(th,-30.)\n    return np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\n\nm_b=float(ml(np.array([1.5]),np.array([0.]))[0])\n\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\n    N=p.N;dR=g.dR\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],np.log(0.153),_L);W=y[N:2*N];th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\n    J=np.exp(lJ);u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12);phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\n    m=ml(J,th)\n    # Internal diffusion (very fast = near uniform)\n    q=np.zeros(N+1)\n    q[1:N]=-p.M0*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR  # no phi-dependent mobility\n    J23=J**(2./3.)\n    lJt=-g.div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(m-m_b)/J\n    R_=rx(u,th,J)\n    nf=np.zeros(N+1)\n    nf[1:N]=q[1:N]*np.where(q[1:N]>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])-p.delta*p.D0*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\n    Wt=-g.div(nf)-p.Da*J*R_+p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\n    h=np.zeros(N+1);h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\n    tht=(-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*J23*th\n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\n\np=P()\ng=G(p.N)\n# EXACTLY uniform IC at collapsed state\nJ0=0.35*np.ones(p.N); u0=0.5*np.ones(p.N); th0=1.7*np.ones(p.N)\ny0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\n\nsol=solve_ivp(lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g),(0,p.t_end),y0,method='BDF',\n              t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),rtol=1e-8,atol=1e-10,max_step=0.3)\nprint(f'Success: {sol.success}')\nJs=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:p.N],np.log(0.153),_L))\nths=sol.y[2*p.N:]\n# Volume average\nwt=g.V/np.sum(g.V)\nJm=np.sum(Js*wt[:,None],axis=0);thm=np.sum(ths*wt[:,None],axis=0)\n# Spatial uniformity\nJstd=np.sqrt(np.sum((Js-Jm[None,:])**2*wt[:,None],axis=0))\n\nprint(f'Final: J={Jm[-1]:.4f}\u00b1{Jstd[-1]:.6f}, \u03b8={thm[-1]:.4f}')\nprint(f'Max spatial std(J) over time: {np.max(Jstd):.8f}')\n\n# Check oscillation\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\ni0=len(sol.t)//2\namp=np.max(thm[i0:])-np.min(thm[i0:])\npks,_=find_peaks(thm[i0:]-np.mean(thm[i0:]),prominence=max(.1*amp,.001))\nprint(f'\u03b8 amp={amp:.4f}, peaks={len(pks)}')\nprint(f'J range: [{np.min(Jm[i0:]):.4f}, {np.max(Jm[i0:]):.4f}]')\nprint(f'\u03b8 range: [{np.min(thm[i0:]):.4f}, {np.max(thm[i0:]):.4f}]')\n\noutdir='/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc';os.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\nfig,axes=plt.subplots(3,1,figsize=(12,9),sharex=True)\naxes[0].plot(sol.t,Jm,'b',lw=1);axes[0].set_ylabel('<J>');axes[0].grid(True,alpha=.3)\naxes[0].set_title(f'N={p.N} uniform IC, no surface, vol J^{{2/3}}: Da={p.Da}')\naxes[1].plot(sol.t,thm,'r',lw=1);axes[1].set_ylabel('<th>');axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\naxes[2].plot(sol.t,Jstd,'b--',lw=1);axes[2].set_ylabel('std(J)');axes[2].set_xlabel('t');axes[2].grid(True,alpha=.3)\nfig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f'{outdir}/uniform_test.png',dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\nshutil.copytree(outdir,'/mnt/user-data/outputs/sphere_geo_osc',dirs_exist_ok=True)\nprint('-> saved')\n\" 2>&1\n",

      "json_block": "{\"language\": \"bash\", \"code\": \"cd /home/claude && timeout 60 python3 -c \\\"\\nimport numpy as np, os, shutil\\nimport matplotlib; matplotlib.use('Agg')\\nimport matplotlib.pyplot as plt\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, replace\\nfrom scipy.integrate import solve_ivp\\nfrom scipy.sparse import lil_matrix, csc_matrix\\n\\n# Minimal test: truly uniform IC, no surface exchange, volume J^{2/3}\\n# Should exactly reproduce 0D for k=0 mode\\n\\n@dataclass\\nclass P:\\n    N:int=5  # very coarse to minimize spatial modes\\n    t_end:float=800.; n_save:int=6000\\n    Da:float=2.5; Bi_J_vol:float=1.0; Bi_c_vol:float=1.0; B_Tvol:float=0.8\\n    Bi_mu:float=0.; Bi_c:float=0.; Bi_T:float=0.  # no surface\\n    alpha:float=50.; delta:float=20.  # VERY fast diffusion = near-uniform\\n    ell:float=0.0; Omega_e:float=0.10; phi_p0:float=0.15\\n    chi_inf:float=0.40;S_chi:float=0.50;chi1:float=0.80\\n    Gamma_A:float=1.0;eps_T:float=0.03;m_act:float=4.0\\n    m_diff:float=0.;m_mob:float=0.  # constant coefficients\\n    M0:float=1.;D0:float=1.;C0:float=1.;K0:float=1.\\n\\n_L=np.log(8.)\\nclass G:\\n    def __init__(s,N):\\n        s.N=N;s.dR=1./N;s.R_f=np.linspace(0,1,N+1);s.R_c=.5*(s.R_f[:-1]+s.R_f[1:])\\n        s.R2_f=s.R_f**2;s.V=(s.R_f[1:]**3-s.R_f[:-1]**3)/3.;s.Vs=np.maximum(s.V,1e-30)\\n    def div(s,f):return(s.R2_f[1:]*f[1:]-s.R2_f[:-1]*f[:-1])/s.Vs\\n\\ndef ml(J,th):\\n    phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\\n    chi=0.40+0.50*th+0.80*phi\\n    return np.log(np.maximum(1-phi,1e-15))+phi+chi*phi**2+0.10*(J**(-1./3.)-1./J)\\n\\ndef rx(u,th,J):\\n    phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\\n    d=1+0.03*np.maximum(th,-30.)\\n    return np.maximum(u,1e-12)*np.maximum(1-phi,1e-12)**4*np.exp(np.clip(1.0*th/d,-50,50))\\n\\nm_b=float(ml(np.array([1.5]),np.array([0.]))[0])\\n\\ndef rhs(t,y,p,g):\\n    N=p.N;dR=g.dR\\n    lJ=np.clip(y[:N],np.log(0.153),_L);W=y[N:2*N];th=np.clip(y[2*N:],-10,25)\\n    J=np.exp(lJ);u=np.maximum(W/J,1e-12);phi=np.clip(0.15/np.maximum(J,0.153),0,.999)\\n    m=ml(J,th)\\n    # Internal diffusion (very fast = near uniform)\\n    q=np.zeros(N+1)\\n    q[1:N]=-p.M0*(m[1:]-m[:-1])/dR  # no phi-dependent mobility\\n    J23=J**(2./3.)\\n    lJt=-g.div(q)/J - p.Bi_J_vol*J23*(m-m_b)/J\\n    R_=rx(u,th,J)\\n    nf=np.zeros(N+1)\\n    nf[1:N]=q[1:N]*np.where(q[1:N]>=0,u[:-1],u[1:])-p.delta*p.D0*(u[1:]-u[:-1])/dR\\n    Wt=-g.div(nf)-p.Da*J*R_+p.Bi_c_vol*J23*(1-u)\\n    h=np.zeros(N+1);h[1:N]=-p.alpha*p.K0*(th[1:]-th[:-1])/dR\\n    tht=(-g.div(h)+p.Da*J*R_)/p.C0 - p.B_Tvol*J23*th\\n    return np.concatenate([lJt,Wt,tht])\\n\\np=P()\\ng=G(p.N)\\n# EXACTLY uniform IC at collapsed state\\nJ0=0.35*np.ones(p.N); u0=0.5*np.ones(p.N); th0=1.7*np.ones(p.N)\\ny0=np.concatenate([np.log(J0),J0*u0,th0])\\n\\nsol=solve_ivp(lambda t,y:rhs(t,y,p,g),(0,p.t_end),y0,method='BDF',\\n              t_eval=np.linspace(0,p.t_end,p.n_save),rtol=1e-8,atol=1e-10,max_step=0.3)\\nprint(f'Success: {sol.success}')\\nJs=np.exp(np.clip(sol.y[:p.N],np.log(0.153),_L))\\nths=sol.y[2*p.N:]\\n# Volume average\\nwt=g.V/np.sum(g.V)\\nJm=np.sum(Js*wt[:,None],axis=0);thm=np.sum(ths*wt[:,None],axis=0)\\n# Spatial uniformity\\nJstd=np.sqrt(np.sum((Js-Jm[None,:])**2*wt[:,None],axis=0))\\n\\nprint(f'Final: J={Jm[-1]:.4f}\\u00b1{Jstd[-1]:.6f}, \\u03b8={thm[-1]:.4f}')\\nprint(f'Max spatial std(J) over time: {np.max(Jstd):.8f}')\\n\\n# Check oscillation\\nfrom scipy.signal import find_peaks\\ni0=len(sol.t)//2\\namp=np.max(thm[i0:])-np.min(thm[i0:])\\npks,_=find_peaks(thm[i0:]-np.mean(thm[i0:]),prominence=max(.1*amp,.001))\\nprint(f'\\u03b8 amp={amp:.4f}, peaks={len(pks)}')\\nprint(f'J range: [{np.min(Jm[i0:]):.4f}, {np.max(Jm[i0:]):.4f}]')\\nprint(f'\\u03b8 range: [{np.min(thm[i0:]):.4f}, {np.max(thm[i0:]):.4f}]')\\n\\noutdir='/home/claude/sphere_geo_osc';os.makedirs(outdir,exist_ok=True)\\nfig,axes=plt.subplots(3,1,figsize=(12,9),sharex=True)\\naxes[0].plot(sol.t,Jm,'b',lw=1);axes[0].set_ylabel('<J>');axes[0].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\naxes[0].set_title(f'N={p.N} uniform IC, no surface, vol J^{{2/3}}: Da={p.Da}')\\naxes[1].plot(sol.t,thm,'r',lw=1);axes[1].set_ylabel('<th>');axes[1].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\naxes[2].plot(sol.t,Jstd,'b--',lw=1);axes[2].set_ylabel('std(J)');axes[2].set_xlabel('t');axes[2].grid(True,alpha=.3)\\nfig.tight_layout();fig.savefig(f'{outdir}/uniform_test.png',dpi=150);plt.close(fig)\\nshutil.copytree(outdir,'/mnt/user-data/outputs/sphere_geo_osc',dirs_exist_ok=True)\\nprint('-> saved')\\n\\\" 2>&1\\n\"}"
